```{r}
  mutate(MCQ010 = if_else(MCQ010 == 1, "Yes", "No"))


## FNS
YesAthma2015Summ <- summary(PFAsAsthmaYay2015)
NoAthma2015Summ <- summary(PFAsAsthmaNay2015)
YesAthma2015Summ
NoAthma2015Summ


## PFHS
### ANOVA
AsthmaFits2015PFHS <- aov(logLBXPFHS ~ MCQ010, data = PFAsTotal2015)
summary(AsthmaFits2015PFHS)

### Mean Difference
diff15a <- diff(tapply(PFAsAsthmaTot2015$logLBXPFHS, PFAsAsthmaTot2015$MCQ010, mean))
AsthmaDifference2015PFHS <- exp(diff15a)
AsthmaDifference2015PFHS

### Confidence Interval
AsthmaConfInt2015PFHS <- t.test(logLBXPFHS ~ MCQ010, data = PFAsAsthmaTot2015)$conf.int
AsthmaConfInt2015PFHS

### Plot
ggplot(data = PFAsAsthmaTot2015, aes(x = logLBXPFHS, fill = MCQ010)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00", "#009E73")) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)


## PFNA
### ANOVA
AsthmaFits2015PFNA <- aov(logLBXPFNA ~ MCQ010, data = PFAsTotal2015)
summary(AsthmaFits2015PFNA)

### Mean Difference
diff15b <- diff(tapply(PFAsAsthmaTot2015$logLBXPFNA, PFAsAsthmaTot2015$MCQ010, mean))
AsthmaDifference2015PFNA <- exp(diff15b)
AsthmaDifference2015PFNA

### Confidence Interval
AsthmaConfInt2015PFNA <- t.test(logLBXPFNA ~ MCQ010, data = PFAsAsthmaTot2015)$conf.int
AsthmaConfInt2015PFNA

### Plot
ggplot(data = PFAsAsthmaTot2015, aes(x = logLBXPFNA, fill = MCQ010)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00", "#009E73")) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)


## Sb-PFOA (BFOA)
### ANOVA
AsthmaFits2015BFOA <- aov(logLBXBFOA ~ MCQ010, data = PFAsTotal2015)
summary(AsthmaFits2015BFOA)

### Mean Difference
diff15c <- diff(tapply(PFAsAsthmaTot2015$logLBXBFOA, PFAsAsthmaTot2015$MCQ010, mean))
AsthmaDifferenceBFOA <- exp(diff15c)
AsthmaDifferenceBFOA

### Confidence Interval
AsthmaConfIntBFOA <- t.test(logLBXBFOA ~ MCQ010, data = PFAsAsthmaTot2015)$conf.int
AsthmaConfIntBFOA

### Plot
ggplot(data = PFAsAsthmaTot2015, aes(x = logLBXBFOA, fill = MCQ010)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00", "#009E73")) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)


## Sm-PFOS (MFOS)
### ANOVA
AsthmaFits2015MFOS <- aov(logLBXMFOS ~ MCQ010, data = PFAsTotal2015)
summary(AsthmaFits2015PFNA)

### Mean Difference
diff15d <- diff(tapply(PFAsAsthmaTot2015$logLBXMFOS, PFAsAsthmaTot2015$MCQ010, mean))
AsthmaDifference2015MFOS <- exp(diff15d)
AsthmaDifference2015MFOS

### Confidence Interval
AsthmaConfInt2015MFOS <- t.test(logLBXMFOS ~ MCQ010, data = PFAsAsthmaTot2015)$conf.int
AsthmaConfInt2015MFOS

### Plot
ggplot(data = PFAsAsthmaTot2015, aes(x = logLBXMFOS, fill = MCQ010)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00", "#009E73")) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)


## n-PFOA (NFOA)
### ANOVA
AsthmaFits2015NFOA <- aov(logLBXNFOA ~ MCQ010, data = PFAsTotal2015)
summary(AsthmaFits2015NFOA)

### Mean Difference
diff15e <- diff(tapply(PFAsAsthmaTot2015$logLBXNFOA, PFAsAsthmaTot2015$MCQ010, mean))
AsthmaDifference2015NFOA <- exp(diff15e)
AsthmaDifference2015NFOA

### Confidence Interval
AsthmaConfInt2015NFOA <- t.test(logLBXNFOA ~ MCQ010, data = PFAsAsthmaTot2015)$conf.int
AsthmaConfInt2015NFOA

### Plot
ggplot(data = PFAsAsthmaTot2015, aes(x = logLBXNFOA, fill = MCQ010)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00", "#009E73")) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)
```

## Emphysema Distributions

```{r}
# 2011 Emphysema Analysis

PFAsEmphyYay2011 <- PFAsTotal2011 |>
  filter(MCQ160G == 1) |>
  select(-c(PFARespQs2011, PFAMetaQs2011, PFAEndoQs2011, PFACardQs2011, PFAident2011))

PFAsEmphyNay2011 <- PFAsTotal2011 |>
  filter(MCQ160G == 2) |>
  select(-c(PFARespQs2011, PFAMetaQs2011, PFAEndoQs2011, PFACardQs2011, PFAident2011))

PFAsEmphyTot2011 <- PFAsTotal2011 |>
  filter(MCQ160G != 7 & MCQ160G != 9) |>
  mutate(MCQ160G = if_else(MCQ160G == 1, "Yes", "No"))


## FNS
YesEmphy2011Summ <- summary(PFAsEmphyYay2011)
NoEmphy2011Summ <- summary(PFAsEmphyNay2011)
YesEmphy2011Summ
NoEmphy2011Summ


## PFHS
### ANOVA
EmphyFits2011PFHS <- aov(logLBXPFHS ~ MCQ160G, data = PFAsTotal2011)
summary(EmphyFits2011PFHS)

### Mean Difference
diffe11a <- diff(tapply(PFAsEmphyTot2011$logLBXPFHS, PFAsEmphyTot2011$MCQ160G, mean))
EmphyDifference2011PFHS <- exp(diffe11a)
EmphyDifference2011PFHS

### Confidence Interval
EmphyConfInt2011PFHS <- t.test(logLBXPFHS ~ MCQ160G, data = PFAsEmphyTot2011)$conf.int
EmphyConfInt2011PFHS

### Plot
ggplot(data = PFAsEmphyTot2011, aes(x = logLBXPFHS, fill = MCQ160G)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00", "#009E73")) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)


## PFNA
### ANOVA
EmphyFits2011PFNA <- aov(logLBXPFNA ~ MCQ160G, data = PFAsTotal2011)
summary(EmphyFits2011PFNA)

### Mean Difference
diffe11b <- diff(tapply(PFAsEmphyTot2011$logLBXPFNA, PFAsEmphyTot2011$MCQ160G, mean))
EmphyDifference2011PFNA <- exp(diffe11b)
EmphyDifference2011PFNA

### Confidence Interval
EmphyConfInt2011PFNA <- t.test(logLBXPFNA ~ MCQ160G, data = PFAsEmphyTot2011)$conf.int
EmphyConfInt2011PFNA

### Plot
ggplot(data = PFAsEmphyTot2011, aes(x = logLBXPFNA, fill = MCQ160G)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00", "#009E73")) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)


## PFOA
### ANOVA
EmphyFits2011PFOA <- aov(logLBXPFOA ~ MCQ160G, data = PFAsTotal2011)
summary(EmphyFits2011PFOA)

### Mean Difference
diffe11c <- diff(tapply(PFAsEmphyTot2011$logLBXPFOA, PFAsEmphyTot2011$MCQ160G, mean))
EmphyDifference2011PFOA <- exp(diffe11c)
EmphyDifference2011PFOA

### Confidence Interval
EmphyConfInt2011PFOA <- t.test(logLBXPFOA ~ MCQ160G, data = PFAsEmphyTot2011)$conf.int
EmphyConfInt2011PFOA

### Plot
ggplot(data = PFAsEmphyTot2011, aes(x = logLBXPFOA, fill = MCQ160G)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00", "#009E73")) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)


## PFOS
### ANOVA
EmphyFits2011PFOS <- aov(logLBXPFOS ~ MCQ160G, data = PFAsTotal2011)
summary(EmphyFits2011PFOS)

### Mean Difference
diffe11c <- diff(tapply(PFAsEmphyTot2011$logLBXPFOS, PFAsEmphyTot2011$MCQ160G, mean))
EmphyDifference2011PFOS <- exp(diffe11c)
EmphyDifference2011PFOS

### Confidence Interval
EmphyConfInt2011PFOS <- t.test(logLBXPFOS ~ MCQ160G, data = PFAsEmphyTot2011)$conf.int
EmphyConfInt2011PFOS

### Plot
ggplot(data = PFAsEmphyTot2011, aes(x = logLBXPFOS, fill = MCQ160G)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00", "#009E73")) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

########################################################

# 2013 Emphysema Analysis

PFAsEmphyYay2013 <- PFAsTotal2013 |>
  filter(MCQ160G == 1) |>
  select(-c(PFARespQs2013, PFAMetaQs2013, PFAEndoQs2013, PFACardQs2013, PFAident2013))

PFAsEmphyNay2013 <- PFAsTotal2013 |>
  filter(MCQ160G == 2) |>
  select(-c(PFARespQs2013, PFAMetaQs2013, PFAEndoQs2013, PFACardQs2013, PFAident2013))

PFAsEmphyTot2013 <- PFAsTotal2013 |>
  filter(MCQ160G != 7 & MCQ160G != 9) |>
  mutate(MCQ160G = if_else(MCQ160G == 1, "Yes", "No"))


## FNS
YesEmphy2013Summ <- summary(PFAsEmphyYay2013)
NoEmphy2013Summ <- summary(PFAsEmphyNay2013)
YesEmphy2013Summ
NoEmphy2013Summ


## PFHS
### ANOVA
EmphyFits2013PFHS <- aov(logSSPFHS ~ MCQ160G, data = PFAsTotal2013)
summary(EmphyFits2013PFHS)

### Mean Difference
diffe13a <- diff(tapply(PFAsEmphyTot2013$logSSPFHS, PFAsEmphyTot2013$MCQ160G, mean))
EmphyDifference2013PFHS <- exp(diffe13a)
EmphyDifference2013PFHS

### Confidence Interval
EmphyConfInt2013PFHS <- t.test(logSSPFHS ~ MCQ160G, data = PFAsEmphyTot2013)$conf.int
AsthmaConfInt2013PFHS

### Plot
ggplot(data = PFAsEmphyTot2013, aes(x = logSSPFHS, fill = MCQ160G)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00", "#009E73")) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)


## PFNA (SSPFNA)
### ANOVA
EmphyFits2013PFNA <- aov(logSSPFNA ~ MCQ160G, data = PFAsTotal2013)
summary(EmphyFits2013PFNA)

### Mean Difference
diffe13b <- diff(tapply(PFAsEmphyTot2013$logSSPFNA, PFAsEmphyTot2013$MCQ160G, mean))
EmphyDifference2013PFNA <- exp(diffe13b)
EmphyDifference2013PFNA

### Confidence Interval
EmphyConfInt2013PFNA <- t.test(logSSPFNA ~ MCQ160G, data = PFAsEmphyTot2013)$conf.int
EmphyConfInt2013PFNA

### Plot
ggplot(data = PFAsEmphyTot2013, aes(x = logSSPFNA, fill = MCQ160G)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00", "#009E73")) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)


## Sb-PFOA (SSBFOA)
### ANOVA
EmphyFits2013BFOA <- aov(logSSBFOA ~ MCQ160G, data = PFAsTotal2013)
summary(EmphyFits2013BFOA)

### Mean Difference
diffe13c <- diff(tapply(PFAsEmphyTot2013$logSSBFOA, PFAsEmphyTot2013$MCQ160G, mean))
EmphyDifference2013BFOA <- exp(diffe13c)
EmphyDifference2013BFOA

### Confidence Interval
EmphyConfInt2013BFOA <- t.test(logSSBFOA ~ MCQ160G, data = PFAsEmphyTot2013)$conf.int
EmphyConfInt2013BFOA

### Plot
ggplot(data = PFAsEmphyTot2013, aes(x = logSSBFOA, fill = MCQ160G)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00", "#009E73")) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)


## Sm-PFOS (SSMFOS)
### ANOVA
EmphyFits2013PFOS <- aov(logSSMFOS ~ MCQ160G, data = PFAsTotal2013)
summary(EmphyFits2013PFOS)

### Mean Difference
diffe13d <- diff(tapply(PFAsEmphyTot2013$logSSMFOS, PFAsEmphyTot2013$MCQ160G, mean))
EmphyDifference2013PFOS <- exp(diffe13d)
EmphyDifference2013PFOS

### Confidence Interval cannot be done

### Plot
ggplot(data = PFAsEmphyTot2013, aes(x = logSSMFOS, fill = MCQ160G)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00", "#009E73")) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)


## n-PFOA (SSNFOS) 
### ANOVA
EmphyFits2013PFOA <- aov(logSSMFOS ~ MCQ160G, data = PFAsTotal2013)
summary(EmphyFits2013PFOA)

### Mean Difference
diffe13e <- diff(tapply(PFAsEmphyTot2013$logSSMFOS, PFAsEmphyTot2013$MCQ160G, mean))
EmphyDifference2013PFOA <- exp(diffe13e)
EmphyDifference2013PFOA

### Confidence Interval cannot be done

### Plot
ggplot(data = PFAsEmphyTot2013, aes(x = logSSMFOS, fill = MCQ160G)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00", "#009E73")) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

########################################################

# 2015 Emphysema Analysis

PFAsEmphyYay2015 <- PFAsTotal2015 |>
  filter(MCQ160G == 1) |>
  select(-c(PFARespQs2015, PFAMetaQs2015, PFAEndoQs2015, PFACardQs2015, PFAident2015))

PFAsEmphyNay2015 <- PFAsTotal2015 |>
  filter(MCQ160G == 2) |>
  select(-c(PFARespQs2015, PFAMetaQs2015, PFAEndoQs2015, PFACardQs2015, PFAident2015))

PFAsEmphyTot2015 <- PFAsTotal2015 |>
  filter(MCQ160G != 7 & MCQ160G != 9) |>
  mutate(MCQ160G = if_else(MCQ160G == 1, "Yes", "No"))


## FNS
YesEmphy2015Summ <- summary(PFAsEmphyYay2015)
NoEmphy2015Summ <- summary(PFAsEmphyNay2015)
YesEmphy2015Summ
NoEmphy2015Summ


## PFHS
### ANOVA
EmphyFits2015PFHS <- aov(logLBXPFHS ~ MCQ160G, data = PFAsTotal2015)
summary(EmphyFits2015PFHS)

### Mean Difference
diffe15a <- diff(tapply(PFAsEmphyTot2015$logLBXPFHS, PFAsEmphyTot2015$MCQ160G, mean))
EmphyDifference2015PFHS <- exp(diffe15a)
EmphyDifference2015PFHS

### Confidence Interval
EmphyConfInt2015PFHS <- t.test(logLBXPFHS ~ MCQ160G, data = PFAsEmphyTot2015)$conf.int
EmphyConfInt2015PFHS

### Plot
ggplot(data = PFAsEmphyTot2015, aes(x = logLBXPFHS, fill = MCQ160G)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00", "#009E73")) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)


## PFNA
### ANOVA
EmphyFits2015PFNA <- aov(logLBXPFNA ~ MCQ160G, data = PFAsTotal2015)
summary(EmphyFits2015PFNA)

### Mean Difference
diffe15b <- diff(tapply(PFAsEmphyTot2015$logLBXPFNA, PFAsEmphyTot2015$MCQ160G, mean))
EmphyDifference2015PFNA <- exp(diffe15b)
EmphyDifference2015PFNA

### Confidence Interval
EmphyConfInt2015PFNA <- t.test(logLBXPFNA ~ MCQ160G, data = PFAsEmphyTot2015)$conf.int
EmphyConfInt2015PFNA

### Plot
ggplot(data = PFAsEmphyTot2015, aes(x = logLBXPFNA, fill = MCQ160G)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00", "#009E73")) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)


## Sb-PFOA (BFOA)
### ANOVA
EmphyFits2015BFOA <- aov(logLBXBFOA ~ MCQ160G, data = PFAsTotal2015)
summary(EmphyFits2015BFOA)

### Mean Difference
diffe15c <- diff(tapply(PFAsEmphyTot2015$logLBXBFOA, PFAsEmphyTot2015$MCQ160G, mean))
EmphyDifference2015BFOA <- exp(diffe15c)
EmphyDifference2015BFOA

### Confidence Interval
EmphyConfInt2015BFOA <- t.test(logLBXBFOA ~ MCQ160G, data = PFAsEmphyTot2015)$conf.int
EmphyConfInt2015BFOA

### Plot
ggplot(data = PFAsEmphyTot2015, aes(x = logLBXBFOA, fill = MCQ160G)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00", "#009E73")) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)


## Sm-PFOS (MFOS)
### ANOVA
EmphyFits2015MFOS <- aov(logLBXMFOS ~ MCQ160G, data = PFAsTotal2015)
summary(EmphyFits2015MFOS)

### Mean Difference
diffe15d <- diff(tapply(PFAsEmphyTot2015$logLBXMFOS, PFAsEmphyTot2015$MCQ160G, mean))
EmphyDifference2015MFOS <- exp(diffe15d)
EmphyDifference2015MFOS

### Confidence Interval
EmphyConfInt2015MFOS <- t.test(logLBXMFOS ~ MCQ160G, data = PFAsEmphyTot2015)$conf.int
EmphyConfInt2015MFOS

### Plot
ggplot(data = PFAsEmphyTot2015, aes(x = logLBXMFOS, fill = MCQ160G)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00", "#009E73")) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)


## n-PFOA (NFOA)
### ANOVA
EmphyFits2015NFOA <- aov(logLBXNFOA ~ MCQ160G, data = PFAsTotal2015)
summary(EmphyFits2015NFOA)

### Mean Difference
diffe15e <- diff(tapply(PFAsEmphyTot2015$logLBXNFOA, PFAsEmphyTot2015$MCQ160G, mean))
EmphyDifference2015NFOA <- exp(diffe15e)
EmphyDifference2015NFOA

### Confidence Interval
EmphyConfInt2015NFOA <- t.test(logLBXNFOA ~ MCQ160G, data = PFAsEmphyTot2015)$conf.int
EmphyConfInt2015NFOA

### Plot
ggplot(data = PFAsEmphyTot2015, aes(x = logLBXNFOA, fill = MCQ160G)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00", "#009E73")) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

```

## Bronchitis Distributions

```{r}
# 2011 Bronchitis Analysis

PFAsBronYay2011 <- PFAsTotal2011 |>
  filter(MCQ160K == 1) |>
  select(-c(PFARespQs2011, PFAMetaQs2011, PFAEndoQs2011, PFACardQs2011, PFAident2011))

PFAsBronNay2011 <- PFAsTotal2011 |>
  filter(MCQ160K == 2) |>
  select(-c(PFARespQs2011, PFAMetaQs2011, PFAEndoQs2011, PFACardQs2011, PFAident2011))

PFAsBronTot2011 <- PFAsTotal2011 |>
  filter(MCQ160K != 7 & MCQ160K != 9) |>
  mutate(MCQ160K = if_else(MCQ160K == 1, "Yes", "No"))


## FNS
YesBron2011Summ <- summary(PFAsBronYay2011)
NoBron2011Summ <- summary(PFAsBronNay2011)
YesBron2011Summ
NoBron2011Summ


## PFHS
### ANOVA
BronFits2011PFHS <- aov(logLBXPFHS ~ MCQ160K, data = PFAsTotal2011)
summary(BronFits2011PFHS)

### Mean Difference
diffb11a <- diff(tapply(PFAsBronTot2011$logLBXPFHS, PFAsBronTot2011$MCQ160K, mean))
BronDifference2011PFHS <- exp(diffb11a)
BronDifference2011PFHS

### Confidence Interval
BronConfInt2011PFHS <- t.test(logLBXPFHS ~ MCQ160K, data = PFAsBronTot2011)$conf.int
BronConfInt2011PFHS

### Plot
ggplot(data = PFAsBronTot2011, aes(x = logLBXPFHS, fill = MCQ160K)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00", "#009E73")) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)


## PFNA
### ANOVA
BronFits2011PFNA <- aov(logLBXPFNA ~ MCQ160K, data = PFAsTotal2011)
summary(BronFits2011PFNA)

### Mean Difference
diffb11b <- diff(tapply(PFAsBronTot2011$logLBXPFNA, PFAsBronTot2011$MCQ160K, mean))
BronDifference2011PFNA <- exp(diffb11b)
BronDifference2011PFNA

### Confidence Interval
BronConfInt2011PFNA <- t.test(logLBXPFNA ~ MCQ160K, data = PFAsBronTot2011)$conf.int
BronConfInt2011PFNA

### Plot
ggplot(data = PFAsBronTot2011, aes(x = logLBXPFNA, fill = MCQ160K)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00", "#009E73")) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)


## PFOA
### ANOVA
BronFits2011PFOA <- aov(logLBXPFOA ~ MCQ160K, data = PFAsTotal2011)
summary(BronFits2011PFOA)

### Mean Difference
diffe11c <- diff(tapply(PFAsBronTot2011$logLBXPFOA, PFAsBronTot2011$MCQ160K, mean))
BronDifference2011PFOA <- exp(diffe11c)
BronDifference2011PFOA

### Confidence Interval
BronConfInt2011PFOA <- t.test(logLBXPFOA ~ MCQ160K, data = PFAsBronTot2011)$conf.int
BronConfInt2011PFOA

### Plot
ggplot(data = PFAsBronTot2011, aes(x = logLBXPFOA, fill = MCQ160K)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00", "#009E73")) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)


## PFOS
### ANOVA
BronFits2011PFOS <- aov(logLBXPFOS ~ MCQ160K, data = PFAsTotal2011)
summary(EmphyFits2011PFOS)

### Mean Difference
diffb11d <- diff(tapply(PFAsBronTot2011$logLBXPFOS, PFAsBronTot2011$MCQ160K, mean))
BronDifference2011PFOS <- exp(diffb11d)
BronDifference2011PFOS

### Confidence Interval
BronConfInt2011PFOS <- t.test(logLBXPFOS ~ MCQ160K, data = PFAsBronTot2011)$conf.int
BronConfInt2011PFOS

### Plot
ggplot(data = PFAsBronTot2011, aes(x = logLBXPFOS, fill = MCQ160G)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00", "#009E73")) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

#####################################################

# 2013 Bronchitis Analysis

PFAsBronYay2013 <- PFAsTotal2013 |>
  filter(MCQ160K == 1) |>
  select(-c(PFARespQs2013, PFAMetaQs2013, PFAEndoQs2013, PFACardQs2013, PFAident2013))

PFAsBronNay2013 <- PFAsTotal2013 |>
  filter(MCQ160K == 2) |>
  select(-c(PFARespQs2013, PFAMetaQs2013, PFAEndoQs2013, PFACardQs2013, PFAident2013))

PFAsBronTot2013 <- PFAsTotal2013 |>
  filter(MCQ160K != 7 & MCQ160K != 9) |>
  mutate(MCQ160K = if_else(MCQ160K == 1, "Yes", "No"))


## FNS
YesBron2013Summ <- summary(PFAsBronYay2013)
NoBron2013Summ <- summary(PFAsBronNay2013)
YesBron2013Summ
NoBron2013Summ


## PFHS
### ANOVA
BronFits2013PFHS <- aov(logSSPFHS ~ MCQ160K, data = PFAsTotal2013)
summary(BronFits2013PFHS)

### Mean Difference
diffb13a <- diff(tapply(PFAsBronTot2013$logSSPFHS, PFAsBronTot2013$MCQ160K, mean))
BronDifference2013PFHS <- exp(diffb13a)
BronDifference2013PFHS

### Confidence Interval
BronConfInt2013PFHS <- t.test(logSSPFHS ~ MCQ160K, data = PFAsBronTot2013)$conf.int
BronConfInt2013PFHS

### Plot
ggplot(data = PFAsBronTot2013, aes(x = logSSPFHS, fill = MCQ160K)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00", "#009E73")) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)


## PFNA (SSPFNA)
### ANOVA
BronFits2013PFNA <- aov(logSSPFNA ~ MCQ160K, data = PFAsTotal2013)
summary(BronFits2013PFNA)

### Mean Difference
diffb13b <- diff(tapply(PFAsBronTot2013$logSSPFNA, PFAsBronTot2013$MCQ160K, mean))
BronDifference2013PFNA <- exp(diffb13b)
BronDifference2013PFNA

### Confidence Interval
BronConfInt2013PFNA <- t.test(logSSPFNA ~ MCQ160K, data = PFAsBronTot2013)$conf.int
BronConfInt2013PFNA

### Plot
ggplot(data = PFAsBronTot2013, aes(x = logSSPFNA, fill = MCQ160K)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00", "#009E73")) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)


## Sb-PFOA (SSBFOA)
### ANOVA
BronFits2013BFOA <- aov(logSSBFOA ~ MCQ160K, data = PFAsTotal2013)
summary(BronFits2013BFOA)

### Mean Difference
diffb13c <- diff(tapply(PFAsBronTot2013$logSSBFOA, PFAsBronTot2013$MCQ160K, mean))
BronDifference2013BFOA <- exp(diffb13c)
BronDifference2013BFOA

### Confidence Interval
BronConfInt2013BFOA <- t.test(logSSBFOA ~ MCQ160K, data = PFAsBronTot2013)$conf.int
BronConfInt2013BFOA

### Plot
ggplot(data = PFAsBronTot2013, aes(x = logSSBFOA, fill = MCQ160K)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00", "#009E73")) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)


## Sm-PFOS (SSMFOS)
### ANOVA
BronFits2013PFOS <- aov(logSSBFOA ~ MCQ160K, data = PFAsTotal2013)
summary(BronFits2013PFOS)

### Mean Difference
diffb13d <- diff(tapply(PFAsBronTot2013$logSSBFOA, PFAsBronTot2013$MCQ160K, mean))
BronDifference2013PFOS <- exp(diffb13d)
BronDifference2013PFOS

### Confidence Interval
BronConfInt2013PFOS <- t.test(logSSBFOA ~ MCQ160K, data = PFAsBronTot2013)$conf.int
BronConfInt2013PFOS

### Plot
ggplot(data = PFAsBronTot2013, aes(x = logSSBFOA, fill = MCQ160K)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00", "#009E73")) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)


## n-PFOA (SSNFOS)
### ANOVA
BronFits2013PFOA <- aov(logSSNFOS ~ MCQ160K, data = PFAsTotal2013)
summary(BronFits2013PFOS)

### Mean Difference
diffb13e <- diff(tapply(PFAsBronTot2013$logSSNFOS, PFAsBronTot2013$MCQ160K, mean))
BronDifference2013PFOA <- exp(diffb13e)
BronDifference2013PFOS

### Confidence Interval cannot be done

### Plot
ggplot(data = PFAsBronTot2013, aes(x = logSSNFOS, fill = MCQ160K)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00", "#009E73")) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

#####################################################

# 2015 Bronchitis Analysis

PFAsBronYay2015 <- PFAsTotal2015 |>
  filter(MCQ160K == 1) |>
  select(-c(PFARespQs2015, PFAMetaQs2015, PFAEndoQs2015, PFACardQs2015, PFAident2015))

PFAsBronNay2015 <- PFAsTotal2015 |>
  filter(MCQ160K == 2) |>
  select(-c(PFARespQs2015, PFAMetaQs2015, PFAEndoQs2015, PFACardQs2015, PFAident2015))

PFAsBronTot2015 <- PFAsTotal2015 |>
  filter(MCQ160K != 7 & MCQ160K != 9) |>
  mutate(MCQ160K = if_else(MCQ160K == 1, "Yes", "No"))


## FNS
YesBron2015Summ <- summary(PFAsBronYay2015)
NoBron2015Summ <- summary(PFAsBronNay2015)
YesBron2015Summ
NoBron2015Summ


## PFHS
### ANOVA
BronFits2015PFHS <- aov(logLBXPFHS ~ MCQ160K, data = PFAsTotal2015)
summary(BronFits2015PFHS)

### Mean Difference
diffb15a <- diff(tapply(PFAsBronTot2015$logLBXPFHS, PFAsBronTot2015$MCQ160K, mean))
BronDifference2015PFHS <- exp(diffb15a)
BronDifference2015PFHS

### Confidence Interval
BronConfInt2015PFHS <- t.test(logLBXPFHS ~ MCQ160K, data = PFAsBronTot2015)$conf.int
BronConfInt2015PFHS

### Plot
ggplot(data = PFAsBronTot2015, aes(x = logLBXPFHS, fill = MCQ160K)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00", "#009E73")) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)


## PFNA
### ANOVA
BronFits2015PFNA <- aov(logLBXPFNA ~ MCQ160K, data = PFAsTotal2015)
summary(BronFits2015PFNA)

### Mean Difference
diffb15b <- diff(tapply(PFAsBronTot2015$logLBXPFNA, PFAsBronTot2015$MCQ160K, mean))
BronDifference2015PFNA <- exp(diffb15b)
BronDifference2015PFNA

### Confidence Interval
BronConfInt2015PFNA <- t.test(logLBXPFNA ~ MCQ160K, data = PFAsBronTot2015)$conf.int
BronConfInt2015PFNA

### Plot
ggplot(data = PFAsBronTot2015, aes(x = logLBXPFNA, fill = MCQ160K)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00", "#009E73")) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)


## Sb-PFOA (BFOA)
### ANOVA
BronFits2015BFOA <- aov(logLBXBFOA ~ MCQ160K, data = PFAsTotal2015)
summary(BronFits2015BFOA)

### Mean Difference
diffb15c <- diff(tapply(PFAsBronTot2015$logLBXBFOA, PFAsBronTot2015$MCQ160K, mean))
BronDifference2015BFOA <- exp(diffb15c)
BronDifference2015BFOA

### Confidence Interval
BronConfInt2015BFOA <- t.test(logLBXBFOA ~ MCQ160K, data = PFAsBronTot2015)$conf.int
BronConfInt2015BFOA

### Plot
ggplot(data = PFAsBronTot2015, aes(x = logLBXBFOA, fill = MCQ160K)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00", "#009E73")) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)


## Sm-PFOS (MFOS)
### ANOVA
BronFits2015MFOS <- aov(logLBXMFOS ~ MCQ160K, data = PFAsTotal2015)
summary(BronFits2015MFOS)

### Mean Difference
diffb15d <- diff(tapply(PFAsBronTot2015$logLBXMFOS, PFAsBronTot2015$MCQ160K, mean))
BronDifference2015MFOS <- exp(diffb15d)
BronDifference2015MFOS

### Confidence Interval
BronConfInt2015MFOS <- t.test(logLBXMFOS ~ MCQ160K, data = PFAsBronTot2015)$conf.int
BronConfInt2015MFOS

### Plot
ggplot(data = PFAsBronTot2015, aes(x = logLBXMFOS, fill = MCQ160K)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00", "#009E73")) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)


## n-PFOA (NFOA)
### ANOVA
BronFits2015NFOA <- aov(logLBXNFOA ~ MCQ160K, data = PFAsTotal2015)
summary(BronFits2015NFOA)

### Mean Difference
diffb15e <- diff(tapply(PFAsBronTot2015$logLBXNFOA, PFAsBronTot2015$MCQ160K, mean))
BronDifference2015NFOA <- exp(diffb15e)
BronDifference2015NFOA

### Confidence Interval
BronConfInt2015NFOA <- t.test(logLBXNFOA ~ MCQ160K, data = PFAsBronTot2015)$conf.int
BronConfInt2015NFOA

### Plot
ggplot(data = PFAsBronTot2015, aes(x = logLBXNFOA, fill = MCQ160K)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00", "#009E73")) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

```

## Thyroid Distributions

```{r}
# 2011 Thyroid Analysis

PFAsThyroidYay2011 <- PFAsTotal2011 |>
  filter(MCQ160M == 1) |>
  select(-c(PFARespQs2011, PFAMetaQs2011, PFAEndoQs2011, PFACardQs2011, PFAident2011))

PFAsThyroidNay2011 <- PFAsTotal2011 |>
  filter(MCQ160M == 2) |>
  select(-c(PFARespQs2011, PFAMetaQs2011, PFAEndoQs2011, PFACardQs2011, PFAident2011))

PFAsThyroidTot2011 <- PFAsTotal2011 |>
  filter(MCQ160M != 7 & MCQ160M != 9) |>
  mutate(MCQ160M = if_else(MCQ160M == 1, "Yes", "No"))


## FNS
YesThyroid2011Summ <- summary(PFAsThyroidYay2011)
NoThyroid2011Summ <- summary(PFAsThyroidNay2011)
YesThyroid2011Summ
NoThyroid2011Summ


## PFHS
### ANOVA
ThyroidFits2011PFHS <- aov(logLBXPFHS ~ MCQ160M, data = PFAsTotal2011)
summary(ThyroidFits2011PFHS)

### Mean Difference
difft11a <- diff(tapply(PFAsThyroidTot2011$logLBXPFHS, PFAsThyroidTot2011$MCQ160M, mean))
ThyroidDifference2011PFHS <- exp(difft11a)
ThyroidDifference2011PFHS

### Confidence Interval
ThyroidConfInt2011PFHS <- t.test(logLBXPFHS ~ MCQ160M, data = PFAsThyroidTot2011)$conf.int
ThyroidConfInt2011PFHS

### Plot
ggplot(data = PFAsThyroidTot2011, aes(x = logLBXPFHS, fill = MCQ160M)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00", "#009E73")) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)


## PFNA
### ANOVA
ThyroidFits2011PFNA <- aov(logLBXPFNA ~ MCQ160M, data = PFAsTotal2011)
summary(ThyroidFits2011PFNA)

### Mean Difference
difft11b <- diff(tapply(PFAsThyroidTot2011$logLBXPFNA, PFAsThyroidTot2011$MCQ160M, mean))
ThyroidDifference2011PFNA <- exp(difft11b)
ThyroidDifference2011PFNA

### Confidence Interval
ThyroidConfInt2011PFNA <- t.test(logLBXPFNA ~ MCQ160M, data = PFAsThyroidTot2011)$conf.int
ThyroidConfInt2011PFNA

### Plot
ggplot(data = PFAsThyroidTot2011, aes(x = logLBXPFNA, fill = MCQ160M)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00", "#009E73")) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)


## PFOA
### ANOVA
ThyroidFits2011PFOA <- aov(logLBXPFOA ~ MCQ160M, data = PFAsTotal2011)
summary(ThyroidFits2011PFOA)

### Mean Difference
difft11c <- diff(tapply(PFAsThyroidTot2011$logLBXPFOA, PFAsThyroidTot2011$MCQ160M, mean))
ThyroidDifference2011PFOA <- exp(difft11c)
ThyroidDifference2011PFOA

### Confidence Interval
ThyroidConfInt2011PFOA <- t.test(logLBXPFOA ~ MCQ160M, data = PFAsThyroidTot2011)$conf.int
ThyroidConfInt2011PFOA

### Plot
ggplot(data = PFAsThyroidTot2011, aes(x = logLBXPFOA, fill = MCQ160M)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00", "#009E73")) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)


## PFOS
### ANOVA
ThyroidFits2011PFOS <- aov(logLBXPFOS ~ MCQ160M, data = PFAsTotal2011)
summary(ThyroidFits2011PFOS)

### Mean Difference
difft11d <- diff(tapply(PFAsThyroidTot2011$logLBXPFOS, PFAsThyroidTot2011$MCQ160M, mean))
ThyroidDifference2011PFOS <- exp(difft11d)
ThyroidDifference2011PFOS

### Confidence Interval
ThyroidConfInt2011PFOS <- t.test(logLBXPFOS ~ MCQ160M, data = PFAsThyroidTot2011)$conf.int
ThyroidConfInt2011PFOS

### Plot
ggplot(data = PFAsThyroidTot2011, aes(x = logLBXPFOS, fill = MCQ160M)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00", "#009E73")) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)


##################################################

# 2013 Thyroid Analysis

PFAsThyroidYay2013 <- PFAsTotal2013 |>
  filter(MCQ160M == 1) |>
  select(-c(PFARespQs2013, PFAMetaQs2013, PFAEndoQs2013, PFACardQs2013, PFAident2013))

PFAsThyroidNay2013 <- PFAsTotal2013 |>
  filter(MCQ160M == 2) |>
  select(-c(PFARespQs2013, PFAMetaQs2013, PFAEndoQs2013, PFACardQs2013, PFAident2013))

PFAsThyroidTot2013 <- PFAsTotal2013 |>
  filter(MCQ160M != 7 & MCQ160M != 9) |>
  mutate(MCQ160M = if_else(MCQ160M == 1, "Yes", "No"))


## FNS
YesThyroid2013Summ <- summary(PFAsThyroidYay2013)
NoThyroid2013Summ <- summary(PFAsThyroidNay2013)
YesThyroid2013Summ
NoThyroid2013Summ


## PFHS
### ANOVA
ThyroidFits2013PFHS <- aov(logSSPFHS ~ MCQ160M, data = PFAsTotal2013)
summary(ThyroidFits2013PFHS)

### Mean Difference
difft13a <- diff(tapply(PFAsThyroidTot2013$logSSPFHS, PFAsThyroidTot2013$MCQ160M, mean))
ThyroidDifference2013PFHS <- exp(difft13a)
ThyroidDifference2013PFHS

### Confidence Interval
ThyroidConfInt2013PFHS <- t.test(logSSPFHS ~ MCQ160M, data = PFAsThyroidTot2013)$conf.int
ThyroidConfInt2013PFHS

### Plot
ggplot(data = PFAsThyroidTot2013, aes(x = logSSPFHS, fill = MCQ160M)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00", "#009E73")) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)


## PFNA (SSPFNA)
### ANOVA
ThyroidFits2013PFNA <- aov(logSSPFNA ~ MCQ160M, data = PFAsTotal2013)
summary(ThyroidFits2013PFNA)

### Mean Difference
difft13b <- diff(tapply(PFAsThyroidTot2013$logSSPFNA, PFAsThyroidTot2013$MCQ160M, mean))
ThyroidDifference2013PFNA <- exp(difft13b)
ThyroidDifference2013PFNA

### Confidence Interval
ThyroidConfInt2013PFNA <- t.test(logSSPFNA ~ MCQ160M, data = PFAsThyroidTot2013)$conf.int
ThyroidConfInt2013PFNA

### Plot
ggplot(data = PFAsThyroidTot2013, aes(x = logSSPFNA, fill = MCQ160M)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00", "#009E73")) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)


## Sb-PFOA (SSBFOA)
### ANOVA
ThyroidFits2013BFOA <- aov(logSSBFOA ~ MCQ160M, data = PFAsTotal2013)
summary(ThyroidFits2013BFOA)

### Mean Difference
difft13c <- diff(tapply(PFAsThyroidTot2013$logSSBFOA, PFAsThyroidTot2013$MCQ160M, mean))
ThyroidDifference2013BFOA <- exp(difft13c)
ThyroidDifference2013BFOA

### Confidence Interval
ThyroidConfInt2013BFOA <- t.test(logSSBFOA ~ MCQ160M, data = PFAsThyroidTot2013)$conf.int
ThyroidConfInt2013BFOA

### Plot
ggplot(data = PFAsThyroidTot2013, aes(x = logSSBFOA, fill = MCQ160M)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00", "#009E73")) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)


## Sm-PFOS (SSMFOS)
### ANOVA
ThyroidFits2013PFOS <- aov(logSSMFOS ~ MCQ160M, data = PFAsTotal2013)
summary(ThyroidFits2013PFOS)

### Mean Difference
difft13d <- diff(tapply(PFAsThyroidTot2013$logSSMFOS, PFAsThyroidTot2013$MCQ160M, mean))
ThyroidDifference2013PFOS <- exp(difft13d)
ThyroidDifference2013PFOS

### Confidence Interval cannot be done

### Plot
ggplot(data = PFAsThyroidTot2013, aes(x = logSSMFOS, fill = MCQ160M)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00", "#009E73")) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)


##n-PFOA (SSNFOS)
### ANOVA
ThyroidFits2013PFOA <- aov(logSSNFOS ~ MCQ160M, data = PFAsTotal2013)
summary(ThyroidFits2013PFOA)

### Mean Difference
difft13e <- diff(tapply(PFAsThyroidTot2013$logSSNFOS, PFAsThyroidTot2013$MCQ160M, mean))
ThyroidDifference2013PFOA <- exp(difft13e)
ThyroidDifference2013PFOA

### Confidence Interval cannot be done

### Plot
ggplot(data = PFAsThyroidTot2013, aes(x = logSSNFOS, fill = MCQ160M)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00", "#009E73")) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

##################################################

# 2015 Thyroid Analysis

PFAsThyroidYay2015 <- PFAsTotal2015 |>
  filter(MCQ160M == 1) |>
  select(-c(PFARespQs2015, PFAMetaQs2015, PFAEndoQs2015, PFACardQs2015, PFAident2015))

PFAsThyroidNay2015 <- PFAsTotal2015 |>
  filter(MCQ160M == 2) |>
  select(-c(PFARespQs2015, PFAMetaQs2015, PFAEndoQs2015, PFACardQs2015, PFAident2015))

PFAsThyroidTot2015 <- PFAsTotal2015 |>
  filter(MCQ160M != 7 & MCQ160M != 9) |>
  mutate(MCQ160M = if_else(MCQ160M == 1, "Yes", "No"))


## FNS
YesThyroid2015Summ <- summary(PFAsThyroidYay2015)
NoThyroid2015Summ <- summary(PFAsThyroidNay2015)
YesThyroid2015Summ
NoThyroid2015Summ


## PFHS
### ANOVA
ThyroidFits2015PFHS <- aov(logLBXPFHS ~ MCQ160M, data = PFAsTotal2015)
summary(ThyroidFits2015PFHS)

### Mean Difference
difft15a <- diff(tapply(PFAsThyroidTot2015$logLBXPFHS, PFAsThyroidTot2015$MCQ160M, mean))
ThyroidDifference2015PFHS <- exp(difft15a)
ThyroidDifference2015PFHS

### Confidence Interval
ThyroidConfInt2015PFHS <- t.test(logLBXPFHS ~ MCQ160M, data = PFAsThyroidTot2015)$conf.int
ThyroidConfInt2015PFHS

### Plot
ggplot(data = PFAsThyroidTot2015, aes(x = logLBXPFHS, fill = MCQ160M)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00", "#009E73")) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)


## PFNA
### ANOVA
ThyroidFits2015PFNA <- aov(logLBXPFNA ~ MCQ160M, data = PFAsTotal2015)
summary(ThyroidFits2015PFNA)

### Mean Difference
difft15b <- diff(tapply(PFAsThyroidTot2015$logLBXPFNA, PFAsThyroidTot2015$MCQ160M, mean))
ThyroidDifference2015PFNA <- exp(difft15b)
ThyroidDifference2015PFNA

### Confidence Interval
ThyroidConfInt2015PFNA <- t.test(logLBXPFNA ~ MCQ160M, data = PFAsThyroidTot2015)$conf.int
ThyroidConfInt2015PFNA

### Plot
ggplot(data = PFAsThyroidTot2015, aes(x = logLBXPFNA, fill = MCQ160M)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00", "#009E73")) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)


## Sb-PFOA (BFOA)
### ANOVA
ThyroidFits2015BFOA <- aov(logLBXBFOA ~ MCQ160M, data = PFAsTotal2015)
summary(ThyroidFits2015BFOA)

### Mean Difference
difft15c <- diff(tapply(PFAsThyroidTot2015$logLBXBFOA, PFAsThyroidTot2015$MCQ160M, mean))
ThyroidDifference2015BFOA <- exp(difft15c)
ThyroidDifference2015BFOA

### Confidence Interval
ThyroidConfInt2015BFOA <- t.test(logLBXBFOA ~ MCQ160M, data = PFAsThyroidTot2015)$conf.int
ThyroidConfInt2015BFOA

### Plot
ggplot(data = PFAsThyroidTot2015, aes(x = logLBXBFOA, fill = MCQ160M)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00", "#009E73")) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)


## Sm-PFOS (MFOS)
### ANOVA
ThyroidFits2015MFOS <- aov(logLBXMFOS ~ MCQ160M, data = PFAsTotal2015)
summary(ThyroidFits2015MFOS)

### Mean Difference
difft15d <- diff(tapply(PFAsThyroidTot2015$logLBXMFOS, PFAsThyroidTot2015$MCQ160M, mean))
ThyroidDifference2015MFOS <- exp(difft15d)
ThyroidDifference2015MFOS

### Confidence Interval
ThyroidConfInt2015MFOS <- t.test(logLBXMFOS ~ MCQ160M, data = PFAsThyroidTot2015)$conf.int
ThyroidConfInt2015MFOS

### Plot
ggplot(data = PFAsThyroidTot2015, aes(x = logLBXMFOS, fill = MCQ160M)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00", "#009E73")) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)


## n-PFOA (NFOA)
### ANOVA
ThyroidFits2015NFOA <- aov(logLBXNFOA ~ MCQ160M, data = PFAsTotal2015)
summary(ThyroidFits2015NFOA)

### Mean Difference
difft15e <- diff(tapply(PFAsThyroidTot2015$logLBXNFOA, PFAsThyroidTot2015$MCQ160M, mean))
ThyroidDifference2015NFOA <- exp(difft15e)
ThyroidDifference2015NFOA

### Confidence Interval
ThyroidConfInt2015NFOA <- t.test(logLBXNFOA ~ MCQ160M, data = PFAsThyroidTot2015)$conf.int
ThyroidConfInt2015NFOA

### Plot
ggplot(data = PFAsThyroidTot2015, aes(x = logLBXNFOA, fill = MCQ160M)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00", "#009E73")) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)


```

## Liver Distributions

```{r}
# 2011 Liver Analysis

PFAsLiverYay2011 <- PFAsTotal2011 |>
  filter(MCQ160L == 1) |>
  select(-c(PFARespQs2011, PFAMetaQs2011, PFAEndoQs2011, PFACardQs2011, PFAident2011))

PFAsLiverNay2011 <- PFAsTotal2011 |>
  filter(MCQ160L == 2) |>
  select(-c(PFARespQs2011, PFAMetaQs2011, PFAEndoQs2011, PFACardQs2011, PFAident2011))

PFAsLiverTot2011 <- PFAsTotal2011 |>
  filter(MCQ160L != 7 & MCQ160L != 9) |>
  mutate(MCQ160L = if_else(MCQ160L == 1, "Yes", "No"))


## FNS
YesLiver2011Summ <- summary(PFAsLiverYay2011)
NoLiver2011Summ <- summary(PFAsLiverNay2011)
YesLiver2011Summ
NoLiver2011Summ


## PFHS
### ANOVA
LiverFits2011PFHS <- aov(logLBXPFHS ~ MCQ160L, data = PFAsTotal2011)
summary(ThyroidFits2011PFHS)

### Mean Difference
diffl11a <- diff(tapply(PFAsLiverTot2011$logLBXPFHS, PFAsLiverTot2011$MCQ160L, mean))
LiverDifference2011PFHS <- exp(diffl11a)
ThyroidDifference2011PFHS

### Confidence Interval
LiverConfInt2011PFHS <- t.test(logLBXPFHS ~ MCQ160L, data = PFAsLiverTot2011)$conf.int
ThyroidConfInt2011PFHS

### Plot
ggplot(data = PFAsLiverTot2011, aes(x = logLBXPFHS, fill = MCQ160L)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00", "#009E73")) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)


## PFNA
### ANOVA
LiverFits2011PFNA <- aov(logLBXPFNA ~ MCQ160L, data = PFAsTotal2011)
summary(ThyroidFits2011PFNA)

### Mean Difference
diffl11b <- diff(tapply(PFAsLiverTot2011$logLBXPFNA, PFAsLiverTot2011$MCQ160L, mean))
LiverDifference2011PFNA <- exp(diffl11b)
ThyroidDifference2011PFNA

### Confidence Interval
LiverConfInt2011PFNA <- t.test(logLBXPFNA ~ MCQ160L, data = PFAsLiverTot2011)$conf.int
ThyroidConfInt2011PFNA

### Plot
ggplot(data = PFAsLiverTot2011, aes(x = logLBXPFNA, fill = MCQ160L)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00", "#009E73")) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)


## PFOA
### ANOVA
LiverFits2011PFOA <- aov(logLBXPFOA ~ MCQ160L, data = PFAsTotal2011)
summary(ThyroidFits2011PFOA)

### Mean Difference
diffl11c <- diff(tapply(PFAsLiverTot2011$logLBXPFOA, PFAsLiverTot2011$MCQ160L, mean))
LiverDifference2011PFOA <- exp(diffl11c)
ThyroidDifference2011PFOA

### Confidence Interval
LiverConfInt2011PFOA <- t.test(logLBXPFOA ~ MCQ160L, data = PFAsLiverTot2011)$conf.int
ThyroidConfInt2011PFOA

### Plot
ggplot(data = PFAsLiverTot2011, aes(x = logLBXPFOA, fill = MCQ160L)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00", "#009E73")) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)


## PFOS
### ANOVA
LiverFits2011PFOS <- aov(logLBXPFOS ~ MCQ160L, data = PFAsTotal2011)
summary(ThyroidFits2011PFOS)

### Mean Difference
diffl11d <- diff(tapply(PFAsLiverTot2011$logLBXPFOS, PFAsLiverTot2011$MCQ160L, mean))
LiverDifference2011PFOS <- exp(diffl11d)
ThyroidDifference2011PFOS

### Confidence Interval
LiverConfInt2011PFOS <- t.test(logLBXPFOS ~ MCQ160L, data = PFAsLiverTot2011)$conf.int
ThyroidConfInt2011PFOS

### Plot
ggplot(data = PFAsLiverTot2011, aes(x = logLBXPFOS, fill = MCQ160L)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00", "#009E73")) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

##################################################

# 2013 Liver Analysis

PFAsLiverYay2013 <- PFAsTotal2013 |>
  filter(MCQ160L == 1) |>
  select(-c(PFARespQs2013, PFAMetaQs2013, PFAEndoQs2013, PFACardQs2013, PFAident2013))

PFAsLiverNay2013 <- PFAsTotal2013 |>
  filter(MCQ160L == 2) |>
  select(-c(PFARespQs2013, PFAMetaQs2013, PFAEndoQs2013, PFACardQs2013, PFAident2013))

PFAsLiverTot2013 <- PFAsTotal2013 |>
  filter(MCQ160L != 7 & MCQ160L != 9) |>
  mutate(MCQ160L = if_else(MCQ160L == 1, "Yes", "No"))


## FNS
YesLiver2013Summ <- summary(PFAsLiverYay2013)
NoLiver2013Summ <- summary(PFAsLiverNay2013)
YesLiver2013Summ
NoLiver2013Summ


## PFHS
### ANOVA
LiverFits2013PFHS <- aov(logSSPFHS ~ MCQ160L, data = PFAsTotal2013)
summary(LiverFits2013PFHS)

### Mean Difference
diffl13a <- diff(tapply(PFAsLiverTot2013$logSSPFHS, PFAsLiverTot2013$MCQ160L, mean))
LiverDifference2013PFHS <- exp(diffl13a)
LiverDifference2013PFHS

### Confidence Interval
LiverConfInt2013PFHS <- t.test(logSSPFHS ~ MCQ160L, data = PFAsLiverTot2013)$conf.int
LiverConfInt2013PFHS

### Plot
ggplot(data = PFAsLiverTot2013, aes(x = logSSPFHS, fill = MCQ160L)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00", "#009E73")) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)


## PFNA (SSPFNA)
### ANOVA
LiverFits2013PFNA <- aov(logSSPFNA ~ MCQ160L, data = PFAsTotal2013)
summary(LiverFits2013PFNA)

### Mean Difference
diffl13b <- diff(tapply(PFAsLiverTot2013$logSSPFNA, PFAsLiverTot2013$MCQ160L, mean))
LiverDifference2013PFNA <- exp(diffl13b)
LiverDifference2013PFNA

### Confidence Interval
LiverConfInt2013PFNA <- t.test(logSSPFNA ~ MCQ160L, data = PFAsLiverTot2013)$conf.int
LiverConfInt2013PFNA

### Plot
ggplot(data = PFAsLiverTot2013, aes(x = logSSPFNA, fill = MCQ160L)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00", "#009E73")) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)


## Sb-PFOA (SSBFOA)
### ANOVA
LiverFits2013BFOA <- aov(logSSBFOA ~ MCQ160L, data = PFAsTotal2013)
summary(LiverFits2013BFOA)

### Mean Difference
diffl13c <- diff(tapply(PFAsLiverTot2013$logSSBFOA, PFAsLiverTot2013$MCQ160L, mean))
LiverDifference2013BFOA <- exp(diffl13c)
LiverDifference2013BFOA

### Confidence Interval
LiverConfInt2013BFOA <- t.test(logSSBFOA ~ MCQ160L, data = PFAsLiverTot2013)$conf.int
LiverConfInt2013BFOA

### Plot
ggplot(data = PFAsLiverTot2013, aes(x = logSSBFOA, fill = MCQ160L)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00", "#009E73")) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)


## Sm-PFOS (SSMFOS) &
### ANOVA
LiverFits2013PFOS <- aov(logSSMFOS ~ MCQ160L, data = PFAsTotal2013)
summary(LiverFits2013PFOS)

### Mean Difference
diffl13d <- diff(tapply(PFAsLiverTot2013$logSSMFOS, PFAsLiverTot2013$MCQ160L, mean))
LiverDifference2013PFOS <- exp(diffl13d)
LiverDifference2013PFOS

### Confidence Interval cannot be done

### Plot
ggplot(data = PFAsLiverTot2013, aes(x = logSSMFOS, fill = MCQ160L)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00", "#009E73")) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## n-PFOA (SSNFOS) are both the same for every individual.
### ANOVA
LiverFits2013PFOA <- aov(logSSNFOS ~ MCQ160L, data = PFAsTotal2013)
summary(LiverFits2013PFOA)

### Mean Difference
diffl13e <- diff(tapply(PFAsLiverTot2013$logSSNFOS, PFAsLiverTot2013$MCQ160L, mean))
LiverDifference2013PFOA <- exp(diffl13e)
LiverDifference2013PFOA

### Confidence Interval cannot be done

### Plot
ggplot(data = PFAsLiverTot2013, aes(x = logSSNFOS, fill = MCQ160L)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00", "#009E73")) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

##################################################

# 2015 Liver Analysis

PFAsLiverYay2015 <- PFAsTotal2015 |>
  filter(MCQ160L == 1) |>
  select(-c(PFARespQs2015, PFAMetaQs2015, PFAEndoQs2015, PFACardQs2015, PFAident2015))

PFAsLiverNay2015 <- PFAsTotal2015 |>
  filter(MCQ160L == 2) |>
  select(-c(PFARespQs2015, PFAMetaQs2015, PFAEndoQs2015, PFACardQs2015, PFAident2015))

PFAsLiverTot2015 <- PFAsTotal2015 |>
  filter(MCQ160L != 7 & MCQ160L != 9) |>
  mutate(MCQ160L = if_else(MCQ160L == 1, "Yes", "No"))


## FNS
YesLiver2015Summ <- summary(PFAsLiverYay2015)
NoLiver2015Summ <- summary(PFAsLiverNay2015)
YesLiver2015Summ
NoLiver2015Summ


## PFHS
### ANOVA
LiverFits2015PFHS <- aov(logLBXPFHS ~ MCQ160L, data = PFAsTotal2015)
summary(LiverFits2015PFHS)

### Mean Difference
diffl15a <- diff(tapply(PFAsLiverTot2015$logLBXPFHS, PFAsLiverTot2015$MCQ160L, mean))
LiverDifference2015PFHS <- exp(diffl15a)
LiverDifference2015PFHS

### Confidence Interval
LiverConfInt2015PFHS <- t.test(logLBXPFHS ~ MCQ160L, data = PFAsLiverTot2015)$conf.int
LiverConfInt2015PFHS

### Plot
ggplot(data = PFAsLiverTot2015, aes(x = logLBXPFHS, fill = MCQ160L)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00", "#009E73")) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)


## PFNA
### ANOVA
LiverFits2015PFNA <- aov(logLBXPFNA ~ MCQ160L, data = PFAsTotal2015)
summary(LiverFits2015PFNA)

### Mean Difference
diffl15b <- diff(tapply(PFAsLiverTot2015$logLBXPFNA, PFAsLiverTot2015$MCQ160L, mean))
LiverDifference2015PFNA <- exp(diffl15b)
LiverDifference2015PFNA

### Confidence Interval
LiverConfInt2015PFNA <- t.test(logLBXPFNA ~ MCQ160L, data = PFAsLiverTot2015)$conf.int
LiverConfInt2015PFNA

### Plot
ggplot(data = PFAsLiverTot2015, aes(x = logLBXPFNA, fill = MCQ160L)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00", "#009E73")) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)


## Sb-PFOA (BFOA)
### ANOVA
LiverFits2015BFOA <- aov(logLBXBFOA ~ MCQ160L, data = PFAsTotal2015)
summary(LiverFits2015BFOA)

### Mean Difference
diffl15c <- diff(tapply(PFAsLiverTot2015$logLBXBFOA, PFAsLiverTot2015$MCQ160L, mean))
LiverDifference2015BFOA <- exp(diffl15c)
LiverDifference2015BFOA

### Confidence Interval
LiverConfInt2015BFOA <- t.test(logLBXBFOA ~ MCQ160L, data = PFAsLiverTot2015)$conf.int
LiverConfInt2015BFOA

### Plot
ggplot(data = PFAsLiverTot2015, aes(x = logLBXBFOA, fill = MCQ160L)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00", "#009E73")) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)


## Sm-PFOS (MFOS)
### ANOVA
LiverFits2015MFOS <- aov(logLBXMFOS ~ MCQ160L, data = PFAsTotal2015)
summary(LiverFits2015MFOS)

### Mean Difference
diffl15d <- diff(tapply(PFAsLiverTot2015$logLBXMFOS, PFAsLiverTot2015$MCQ160L, mean))
LiverDifference2015MFOS <- exp(diffl15d)
LiverDifference2015MFOS

### Confidence Interval
LiverConfInt2015MFOS <- t.test(logLBXMFOS ~ MCQ160L, data = PFAsLiverTot2015)$conf.int
LiverConfInt2015MFOS

### Plot
ggplot(data = PFAsLiverTot2015, aes(x = logLBXMFOS, fill = MCQ160L)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00", "#009E73")) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)


## n-PFOA (NFOA)
### ANOVA
LiverFits2015NFOA <- aov(logLBXNFOA ~ MCQ160L, data = PFAsTotal2015)
summary(LiverFits2015NFOA)

### Mean Difference
diffl15e <- diff(tapply(PFAsLiverTot2015$logLBXNFOA, PFAsLiverTot2015$MCQ160L, mean))
LiverDifference2015NFOA <- exp(diffl15e)
LiverDifference2015NFOA

### Confidence Interval
LiverConfInt2015NFOA <- t.test(logLBXNFOA ~ MCQ160L, data = PFAsLiverTot2015)$conf.int
LiverConfInt2015NFOA

### Plot
ggplot(data = PFAsLiverTot2015, aes(x = logLBXNFOA, fill = MCQ160L)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00", "#009E73")) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

```

## Diabetes Distributions
```{r}
# 2011 Diabetes Analysis

PFAsDiabTot2011 <- PFAsTotal2011 |>
  filter(DIQ010 %in% c(1,2,3)) |>
  mutate(DIQ010 = factor(DIQ010,
                         levels = c(1,2,3),
                         labels = c("Yes","No","Borderline")))

## FNS (FIXED DATASET)
summary(PFAsDiabTot2011)

## PFHS
DiabFits2011PFHS <- aov(logLBXPFHS ~ DIQ010, data = PFAsDiabTot2011)
summary(DiabFits2011PFHS)
exp(tapply(PFAsDiabTot2011$logLBXPFHS, PFAsDiabTot2011$DIQ010, mean))
TukeyHSD(DiabFits2011PFHS)

ggplot(PFAsDiabTot2011, aes(x = logLBXPFHS, fill = DIQ010)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## PFNA
DiabFits2011PFNA <- aov(logLBXPFNA ~ DIQ010, data = PFAsDiabTot2011)
summary(DiabFits2011PFNA)
exp(tapply(PFAsDiabTot2011$logLBXPFNA, PFAsDiabTot2011$DIQ010, mean))
TukeyHSD(DiabFits2011PFNA)

ggplot(PFAsDiabTot2011, aes(x = logLBXPFNA, fill = DIQ010)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## PFOA
DiabFits2011PFOA <- aov(logLBXPFOA ~ DIQ010, data = PFAsDiabTot2011)
summary(DiabFits2011PFOA)
exp(tapply(PFAsDiabTot2011$logLBXPFOA, PFAsDiabTot2011$DIQ010, mean))
TukeyHSD(DiabFits2011PFOA)

ggplot(PFAsDiabTot2011, aes(x = logLBXPFOA, fill = DIQ010)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## PFOS
DiabFits2011PFOS <- aov(logLBXPFOS ~ DIQ010, data = PFAsDiabTot2011)
summary(DiabFits2011PFOS)
exp(tapply(PFAsDiabTot2011$logLBXPFOS, PFAsDiabTot2011$DIQ010, mean))
TukeyHSD(DiabFits2011PFOS)

ggplot(PFAsDiabTot2011, aes(x = logLBXPFOS, fill = DIQ010)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

# 2013 Diabetes Analysis
PFAsDiab2013 <- PFAsTotal2013 |>
  filter(DIQ010 %in% c(1,2,3)) |>
  mutate(DIQ010 = factor(DIQ010,
                         levels = c(1,2,3),
                         labels = c("Yes","No","Borderline")))

## FNS (overall check)
summary(PFAsDiab2013)

## PFHS
Diab2013PFHS <- aov(logSSPFHS ~ DIQ010, data = PFAsDiab2013)
summary(Diab2013PFHS)

diff13_pfhs <- diff(tapply(PFAsDiab2013$logSSPFHS,
                           PFAsDiab2013$DIQ010, mean))
exp(diff13_pfhs)

#t.test(logSSPFHS ~ DIQ010, data = PFAsDiab2013)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsDiab2013, aes(x = logSSPFHS, fill = DIQ010))+
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## PFNA
Diab2013PFNA <- aov(logSSPFNA ~ DIQ010, data = PFAsDiab2013)
summary(Diab2013PFNA)

diff13_pfna <- diff(tapply(PFAsDiab2013$logSSPFNA,
                           PFAsDiab2013$DIQ010, mean))
exp(diff13_pfna)

#t.test(logSSPFNA ~ DIQ010, data = PFAsDiab2013)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsDiab2013, aes(x = logSSPFNA, fill = DIQ010)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## BFOA
Diab2013BFOA <- aov(logSSBFOA ~ DIQ010, data = PFAsDiab2013)
summary(Diab2013BFOA)

diff13_bfoa <- diff(tapply(PFAsDiab2013$logSSBFOA,
                           PFAsDiab2013$DIQ010, mean))
exp(diff13_bfoa)

#t.test(logSSBFOA ~ DIQ010, data = PFAsDiab2013)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsDiab2013, aes(x = logSSBFOA, fill = DIQ010)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## MFOS
Diab2013MFOS <- aov(logSSMFOS ~ DIQ010, data = PFAsDiab2013)
summary(Diab2013MFOS)

diff13_mfos <- diff(tapply(PFAsDiab2013$logSSMFOS,
                           PFAsDiab2013$DIQ010, mean))
exp(diff13_mfos)

#t.test(logSSMFOS ~ DIQ010, data = PFAsDiab2013)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsDiab2013, aes(x = logSSMFOS, fill = DIQ010)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## NFOA
Diab2013NFOS <- aov(logSSNFOS ~ DIQ010, data = PFAsDiab2013)
summary(Diab2013NFOS)

diff13_nfos <- diff(tapply(PFAsDiab2013$logSSNFOS,
                           PFAsDiab2013$DIQ010, mean))
exp(diff13_nfos)

#t.test(logSSNFOA ~ DIQ010, data = PFAsDiab2013)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsDiab2013, aes(x = logSSNFOS, fill = DIQ010))  +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

# 2015 Diabetes Analysis

PFAsDiabTot2015 <- PFAsTotal2015 |>
  filter(DIQ010 %in% c(1,2,3)) |>
  mutate(DIQ010 = factor(DIQ010,
                         levels = c(1,2,3),
                         labels = c("Yes","No","Borderline")))

## PFHS
DiabFits2015PFHS <- aov(logLBXPFHS ~ DIQ010, data = PFAsDiabTot2015)
summary(DiabFits2015PFHS)
exp(tapply(PFAsDiabTot2015$logLBXPFHS, PFAsDiabTot2015$DIQ010, mean))
TukeyHSD(DiabFits2015PFHS)

ggplot(PFAsDiabTot2015, aes(x = logLBXPFHS, fill = DIQ010)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## PFNA
DiabFits2015PFNA <- aov(logLBXPFNA ~ DIQ010, data = PFAsDiabTot2015)
summary(DiabFits2015PFNA)
exp(tapply(PFAsDiabTot2015$logLBXPFNA, PFAsDiabTot2015$DIQ010, mean))
TukeyHSD(DiabFits2015PFNA)

ggplot(PFAsDiabTot2015, aes(x = logLBXPFNA, fill = DIQ010)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## BFOA
DiabFits2015BFOA <- aov(logLBXBFOA ~ DIQ010, data = PFAsDiabTot2015)
summary(DiabFits2015BFOA)
exp(tapply(PFAsDiabTot2015$logLBXBFOA, PFAsDiabTot2015$DIQ010, mean))
TukeyHSD(DiabFits2015BFOA)

ggplot(PFAsDiabTot2015, aes(x = logLBXBFOA, fill = DIQ010)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## MFOS
DiabFits2015MFOS <- aov(logLBXMFOS ~ DIQ010, data = PFAsDiabTot2015)
summary(DiabFits2015MFOS)
exp(tapply(PFAsDiabTot2015$logLBXMFOS, PFAsDiabTot2015$DIQ010, mean))
TukeyHSD(DiabFits2015MFOS)

ggplot(PFAsDiabTot2015, aes(x = logLBXMFOS, fill = DIQ010)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## NFOA
DiabFits2015NFOA <- aov(logLBXNFOA ~ DIQ010, data = PFAsDiabTot2015)
summary(DiabFits2015NFOA)
exp(tapply(PFAsDiabTot2015$logLBXNFOA, PFAsDiabTot2015$DIQ010, mean))
TukeyHSD(DiabFits2015NFOA)

ggplot(PFAsDiabTot2015, aes(x = logLBXNFOA, fill = DIQ010)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)
```

## Pre-Diabetes

```{r}

# 2011 Pre-diabetes Analysis

PFAsPreDiabTot2011 <- PFAsTotal2011 |>
  filter(DIQ160 %in% c(1,2)) |>
  mutate(DIQ160 = if_else(DIQ160 == 1, "Yes", "No"))

## PFHS
diff11_pfhs <- diff(tapply(PFAsPreDiabTot2011$logLBXPFHS,
                           PFAsPreDiabTot2011$DIQ160, mean))
exp(diff11_pfhs)

t.test(logLBXPFHS ~ DIQ160, data = PFAsPreDiabTot2011)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsPreDiabTot2011, aes(x = logLBXPFHS, fill = DIQ160)) + geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## PFNA
diff11_pfna <- diff(tapply(PFAsPreDiabTot2011$logLBXPFNA,
                           PFAsPreDiabTot2011$DIQ160, mean))
exp(diff11_pfna)

t.test(logLBXPFNA ~ DIQ160, data = PFAsPreDiabTot2011)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsPreDiabTot2011, aes(x = logLBXPFNA, fill = DIQ160)) +  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## PFOA
diff11_pfoa <- diff(tapply(PFAsPreDiabTot2011$logLBXPFOA,
                           PFAsPreDiabTot2011$DIQ160, mean))
exp(diff11_pfoa)

t.test(logLBXPFOA ~ DIQ160, data = PFAsPreDiabTot2011)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsPreDiabTot2011, aes(x = logLBXPFOA, fill = DIQ160)) + geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## PFOS
diff11_pfos <- diff(tapply(PFAsPreDiabTot2011$logLBXPFOS,
                           PFAsPreDiabTot2011$DIQ160, mean))
exp(diff11_pfos)

t.test(logLBXPFOS ~ DIQ160, data = PFAsPreDiabTot2011)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsPreDiabTot2011, aes(x = logLBXPFOS, fill = DIQ160)) + geom_density(alpha = 0.4)
# 2013 Pre-diabetes Analysis

PFAsPreDiabTot2013 <- PFAsTotal2013 |>
  filter(DIQ160 %in% c(1,2)) |>
  mutate(DIQ160 = if_else(DIQ160 == 1, "Yes", "No"))

## PFHS
diff13_pfhs <- diff(tapply(PFAsPreDiabTot2013$logSSPFHS,
                           PFAsPreDiabTot2013$DIQ160, mean))
exp(diff13_pfhs)

t.test(logSSPFHS ~ DIQ160, data = PFAsPreDiabTot2013)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsPreDiabTot2013, aes(x = logSSPFHS, fill = DIQ160)) + geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## PFNA
diff13_pfna <- diff(tapply(PFAsPreDiabTot2013$logSSPFNA,
                           PFAsPreDiabTot2013$DIQ160, mean))
exp(diff13_pfna)

#t.test(logSSPFNA ~ DIQ160, data = PFAsPreDiabTot2013)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsPreDiabTot2013, aes(x = logSSPFNA, fill = DIQ160)) + geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## BFOA
diff13_bfoa <- diff(tapply(PFAsPreDiabTot2013$logSSBFOA,
                           PFAsPreDiabTot2013$DIQ160, mean))
exp(diff13_bfoa)

#t.test(logSSBFOA ~ DIQ160, data = PFAsPreDiabTot2013)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsPreDiabTot2013, aes(x = logSSBFOA, fill = DIQ160)) + geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## MFOS
diff13_mfos <- diff(tapply(PFAsPreDiabTot2013$logSSMFOS,
                           PFAsPreDiabTot2013$DIQ160, mean))
exp(diff13_mfos)

#t.test(logSSMFOS ~ DIQ160, data = PFAsPreDiabTot2013)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsPreDiabTot2013, aes(x = logSSMFOS, fill = DIQ160)) + geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## NFOA 
#diff13_nfoa <- diff(tapply(PFAsPreDiabTot2013$logSSNFOA,
#                           PFAsPreDiabTot2013$DIQ160, mean))
#exp(diff13_nfoa)

#t.test(logSSNFOA ~ DIQ160, data = PFAsPreDiabTot2013)$conf.int

#ggplot(PFAsPreDiabTot2013, aes(x = logSSNFOA, fill = DIQ160)) + geom_density(alpha = 0.4)
# 2015 Pre-diabetes Analysis
#2015
PFAsPreDiabTot2015 <- PFAsTotal2015 |>
  filter(DIQ160 %in% c(1,2)) |>
  mutate(DIQ160 = if_else(DIQ160 == 1, "Yes", "No"))

## PFHS
diff15_pfhs <- diff(tapply(PFAsPreDiabTot2015$logLBXPFHS,
                           PFAsPreDiabTot2015$DIQ160, mean))
exp(diff15_pfhs)

t.test(logLBXPFHS ~ DIQ160, data = PFAsPreDiabTot2015)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsPreDiabTot2015, aes(x = logLBXPFHS, fill = DIQ160)) + geom_density(alpha = 0.4)
#2015
## PFNA
diff15_pfna <- diff(tapply(PFAsPreDiabTot2015$logLBXPFNA,
                           PFAsPreDiabTot2015$DIQ160, mean))
exp(diff15_pfna)

t.test(logLBXPFNA ~ DIQ160, data = PFAsPreDiabTot2015)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsPreDiabTot2015, aes(x = logLBXPFNA, fill = DIQ160)) + geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## BFOA
diff15_bfoa <- diff(tapply(PFAsPreDiabTot2015$logLBXBFOA,
                           PFAsPreDiabTot2015$DIQ160, mean))
exp(diff15_bfoa)

t.test(logLBXBFOA ~ DIQ160, data = PFAsPreDiabTot2015)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsPreDiabTot2015, aes(x = logLBXBFOA, fill = DIQ160)) + geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## MFOS
diff15_mfos <- diff(tapply(PFAsPreDiabTot2015$logLBXMFOS,
                           PFAsPreDiabTot2015$DIQ160, mean))
exp(diff15_mfos)

t.test(logLBXMFOS ~ DIQ160, data = PFAsPreDiabTot2015)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsPreDiabTot2015, aes(x = logLBXMFOS, fill = DIQ160)) + geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## NFOA
diff15_nfoa <- diff(tapply(PFAsPreDiabTot2015$logLBXNFOA,
                           PFAsPreDiabTot2015$DIQ160, mean))
exp(diff15_nfoa)

t.test(logLBXNFOA ~ DIQ160, data = PFAsPreDiabTot2015)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsPreDiabTot2015, aes(x = logLBXNFOA, fill = DIQ160)) + geom_density(alpha = 0.4)
```

## Congestive Heart Failure

```{r}
#2011
PFAsCHFTot2011 <- PFAsTotal2011 |>
  filter(MCQ160B %in% c(1,2)) |>
  mutate(MCQ160B = factor(MCQ160B,
                          levels = c(1,2),
                          labels = c("Yes","No")))

summary(PFAsCHFTot2011)

### PFHS
CHFFits2011PFHS <- aov(logLBXPFHS ~ MCQ160B, data = PFAsCHFTot2011)
summary(CHFFits2011PFHS)

diff11_pfhs <- diff(tapply(PFAsCHFTot2011$logLBXPFHS,
                           PFAsCHFTot2011$MCQ160B, mean))
exp(diff11_pfhs)

t.test(logLBXPFHS ~ MCQ160B, data = PFAsCHFTot2011)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsCHFTot2011, aes(x = logLBXPFHS, fill = MCQ160B)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

### PFNA
CHFFits2011PFNA <- aov(logLBXPFNA ~ MCQ160B, data = PFAsCHFTot2011)
summary(CHFFits2011PFNA)

diff11_pfna <- diff(tapply(PFAsCHFTot2011$logLBXPFNA,
                           PFAsCHFTot2011$MCQ160B, mean))
exp(diff11_pfna)

t.test(logLBXPFNA ~ MCQ160B, data = PFAsCHFTot2011)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsCHFTot2011, aes(x = logLBXPFNA, fill = MCQ160B)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

### PFOA
CHFFits2011PFOA <- aov(logLBXPFOA ~ MCQ160B, data = PFAsCHFTot2011)
summary(CHFFits2011PFOA)

diff11_pfoa <- diff(tapply(PFAsCHFTot2011$logLBXPFOA,
                           PFAsCHFTot2011$MCQ160B, mean))
exp(diff11_pfoa)

t.test(logLBXPFOA ~ MCQ160B, data = PFAsCHFTot2011)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsCHFTot2011, aes(x = logLBXPFOA, fill = MCQ160B)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

### PFOS
CHFFits2011PFOS <- aov(logLBXPFOS ~ MCQ160B, data = PFAsCHFTot2011)
summary(CHFFits2011PFOS)

diff11_pfos <- diff(tapply(PFAsCHFTot2011$logLBXPFOS,
                           PFAsCHFTot2011$MCQ160B, mean))
exp(diff11_pfos)

t.test(logLBXPFOS ~ MCQ160B, data = PFAsCHFTot2011)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsCHFTot2011, aes(x = logLBXPFOS, fill = MCQ160B)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)
## 2013
PFAsCHFTot2013 <- PFAsTotal2013 |>
  filter(MCQ160B %in% c(1,2)) |>
  mutate(MCQ160B = factor(MCQ160B,
                          levels = c(1,2),
                          labels = c("Yes","No")))

summary(PFAsCHFTot2013)

### PFHS
CHFFits2013PFHS <- aov(logSSPFHS ~ MCQ160B, data = PFAsCHFTot2013)
summary(CHFFits2013PFHS)

diff13_pfhs <- diff(tapply(PFAsCHFTot2013$logSSPFHS,
                           PFAsCHFTot2013$MCQ160B, mean))
exp(diff13_pfhs)

t.test(logSSPFHS ~ MCQ160B, data = PFAsCHFTot2013)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsCHFTot2013, aes(x = logSSPFHS, fill = MCQ160B)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

### PFNA
CHFFits2013PFNA <- aov(logSSPFNA ~ MCQ160B, data = PFAsCHFTot2013)
summary(CHFFits2013PFNA)

diff13_pfna <- diff(tapply(PFAsCHFTot2013$logSSPFNA,
                           PFAsCHFTot2013$MCQ160B, mean))
exp(diff13_pfna)

t.test(logSSPFNA ~ MCQ160B, data = PFAsCHFTot2013)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsCHFTot2013, aes(x = logSSPFNA, fill = MCQ160B)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

### BFOA
CHFFits2013BFOA <- aov(logSSBFOA ~ MCQ160B, data = PFAsCHFTot2013)
summary(CHFFits2013BFOA)

diff13_bfoa <- diff(tapply(PFAsCHFTot2013$logSSBFOA,
                           PFAsCHFTot2013$MCQ160B, mean))
exp(diff13_bfoa)

t.test(logSSBFOA ~ MCQ160B, data = PFAsCHFTot2013)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsCHFTot2013, aes(x = logSSBFOA, fill = MCQ160B)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

### MFOS
CHFFits2013MFOS <- aov(logSSMFOS ~ MCQ160B, data = PFAsCHFTot2013)
summary(CHFFits2013MFOS)

diff13_mfos <- diff(tapply(PFAsCHFTot2013$logSSMFOS,
                           PFAsCHFTot2013$MCQ160B, mean))
exp(diff13_mfos)

#t.test(logSSMFOS ~ MCQ160B, data = PFAsCHFTot2013)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsCHFTot2013, aes(x = logSSMFOS, fill = MCQ160B)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

### NFOS
CHFFits2013NFOS <- aov(logSSNFOS ~ MCQ160B, data = PFAsCHFTot2013)
summary(CHFFits2013NFOS)

diff13_nfos <- diff(tapply(PFAsCHFTot2013$logSSNFOS,
                           PFAsCHFTot2013$MCQ160B, mean))
exp(diff13_nfos)

#t.test(logSSNFOS ~ MCQ160B, data = PFAsCHFTot2013)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsCHFTot2013, aes(x = logSSNFOS, fill = MCQ160B)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

# 2015
PFAsCHFTot2015 <- PFAsTotal2015 |>
  filter(MCQ160B %in% c(1,2)) |>
  mutate(MCQ160B = factor(MCQ160B,
                          levels = c(1,2),
                          labels = c("Yes","No")))

## FNS
summary(PFAsCHFTot2015)

## PFHS
CHFFits2015PFHS <- aov(logLBXPFHS ~ MCQ160B, data = PFAsCHFTot2015)
summary(CHFFits2015PFHS)

### Mean Difference
diff15_pfhs <- diff(tapply(PFAsCHFTot2015$logLBXPFHS,
                           PFAsCHFTot2015$MCQ160B, mean))
AsthmaDifference2015PFHS <- exp(diff15_pfhs)
AsthmaDifference2015PFHS

### Confidence Interval
CHFFits2015PFHS_CI <- t.test(logLBXPFHS ~ MCQ160B,
                              data = PFAsCHFTot2015)$conf.int
CHFFits2015PFHS_CI

### Plot
ggplot(PFAsCHFTot2015, aes(x = logLBXPFHS, fill = MCQ160B)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)


## PFNA
CHFFits2015PFNA <- aov(logLBXPFNA ~ MCQ160B, data = PFAsCHFTot2015)
summary(CHFFits2015PFNA)

### Mean Difference
diff15_pfna <- diff(tapply(PFAsCHFTot2015$logLBXPFNA,
                           PFAsCHFTot2015$MCQ160B, mean))
AsthmaDifference2015PFNA <- exp(diff15_pfna)
AsthmaDifference2015PFNA

### Confidence Interval
CHFFits2015PFNA_CI <- t.test(logLBXPFNA ~ MCQ160B,
                              data = PFAsCHFTot2015)$conf.int
CHFFits2015PFNA_CI

### Plot
ggplot(PFAsCHFTot2015, aes(x = logLBXPFNA, fill = MCQ160B)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)


## BFOA
CHFFits2015BFOA <- aov(logLBXBFOA ~ MCQ160B, data = PFAsCHFTot2015)
summary(CHFFits2015BFOA)

### Mean Difference
diff15_bfoa <- diff(tapply(PFAsCHFTot2015$logLBXBFOA,
                           PFAsCHFTot2015$MCQ160B, mean))
AsthmaDifference2015BFOA <- exp(diff15_bfoa)
AsthmaDifference2015BFOA

### Confidence Interval
CHFFits2015BFOA_CI <- t.test(logLBXBFOA ~ MCQ160B,
                              data = PFAsCHFTot2015)$conf.int
CHFFits2015BFOA_CI

### Plot
ggplot(PFAsCHFTot2015, aes(x = logLBXBFOA, fill = MCQ160B)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)


## MFOS
CHFFits2015MFOS <- aov(logLBXMFOS ~ MCQ160B, data = PFAsCHFTot2015)
summary(CHFFits2015MFOS)

### Mean Difference
diff15_mfos <- diff(tapply(PFAsCHFTot2015$logLBXMFOS,
                           PFAsCHFTot2015$MCQ160B, mean))
AsthmaDifference2015MFOS <- exp(diff15_mfos)
AsthmaDifference2015MFOS

### Confidence Interval
CHFFits2015MFOS_CI <- t.test(logLBXMFOS ~ MCQ160B,
                              data = PFAsCHFTot2015)$conf.int
CHFFits2015MFOS_CI

### Plot
ggplot(PFAsCHFTot2015, aes(x = logLBXMFOS, fill = MCQ160B)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)


## NFOA
CHFFits2015NFOA <- aov(logLBXNFOA ~ MCQ160B, data = PFAsCHFTot2015)
summary(CHFFits2015NFOA)

### Mean Difference
diff15_nfoa <- diff(tapply(PFAsCHFTot2015$logLBXNFOA,
                           PFAsCHFTot2015$MCQ160B, mean))
AsthmaDifference2015NFOA <- exp(diff15_nfoa)
AsthmaDifference2015NFOA

### Confidence Interval
CHFFits2015NFOA_CI <- t.test(logLBXNFOA ~ MCQ160B,
                              data = PFAsCHFTot2015)$conf.int
CHFFits2015NFOA_CI

### Plot
ggplot(PFAsCHFTot2015, aes(x = logLBXNFOA, fill = MCQ160B)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)
```

## Coronary Heart Disease 

```{r}
## 2011
PFAsCHDTot2011 <- PFAsTotal2011 |>
  filter(MCQ160C %in% c(1,2)) |>
  mutate(MCQ160C = factor(MCQ160C,
                          levels = c(1,2),
                          labels = c("Yes","No")))

summary(PFAsCHDTot2011)

## PFHS
CHDFits2011PFHS <- aov(logLBXPFHS ~ MCQ160C, data = PFAsCHDTot2011)
summary(CHDFits2011PFHS)

diff11_pfhs <- diff(tapply(PFAsCHDTot2011$logLBXPFHS,
                           PFAsCHDTot2011$MCQ160C, mean))
exp(diff11_pfhs)

t.test(logLBXPFHS ~ MCQ160C, data = PFAsCHDTot2011)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsCHDTot2011, aes(x = logLBXPFHS, fill = MCQ160C)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## PFNA
CHDFits2011PFNA <- aov(logLBXPFNA ~ MCQ160C, data = PFAsCHDTot2011)
summary(CHDFits2011PFNA)

diff11_pfna <- diff(tapply(PFAsCHDTot2011$logLBXPFNA,
                           PFAsCHDTot2011$MCQ160C, mean))
exp(diff11_pfna)

t.test(logLBXPFNA ~ MCQ160C, data = PFAsCHDTot2011)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsCHDTot2011, aes(x = logLBXPFNA, fill = MCQ160C)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## PFOA
CHDFits2011PFOA <- aov(logLBXPFOA ~ MCQ160C, data = PFAsCHDTot2011)
summary(CHDFits2011PFOA)

diff11_pfoa <- diff(tapply(PFAsCHDTot2011$logLBXPFOA,
                           PFAsCHDTot2011$MCQ160C, mean))
exp(diff11_pfoa)

t.test(logLBXPFOA ~ MCQ160C, data = PFAsCHDTot2011)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsCHDTot2011, aes(x = logLBXPFOA, fill = MCQ160C)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## PFOS
CHDFits2011PFOS <- aov(logLBXPFOS ~ MCQ160C, data = PFAsCHDTot2011)
summary(CHDFits2011PFOS)

diff11_pfos <- diff(tapply(PFAsCHDTot2011$logLBXPFOS,
                           PFAsCHDTot2011$MCQ160C, mean))
exp(diff11_pfos)

t.test(logLBXPFOS ~ MCQ160C, data = PFAsCHDTot2011)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsCHDTot2011, aes(x = logLBXPFOS, fill = MCQ160C)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## 2013
PFAsCHDTot2013 <- PFAsTotal2013 |>
  filter(MCQ160C %in% c(1,2)) |>
  mutate(MCQ160C = factor(MCQ160C,
                          levels = c(1,2),
                          labels = c("Yes","No")))

summary(PFAsCHDTot2013)

## PFHS
CHDFits2013PFHS <- aov(logSSPFHS ~ MCQ160C, data = PFAsCHDTot2013)
summary(CHDFits2013PFHS)

diff13_pfhs <- diff(tapply(PFAsCHDTot2013$logSSPFHS,
                           PFAsCHDTot2013$MCQ160C, mean))
exp(diff13_pfhs)

t.test(logSSPFHS ~ MCQ160C, data = PFAsCHDTot2013)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsCHDTot2013, aes(x = logSSPFHS, fill = MCQ160C)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## PFNA
CHDFits2013PFNA <- aov(logSSPFNA ~ MCQ160C, data = PFAsCHDTot2013)
summary(CHDFits2013PFNA)

diff13_pfna <- diff(tapply(PFAsCHDTot2013$logSSPFNA,
                           PFAsCHDTot2013$MCQ160C, mean))
exp(diff13_pfna)

t.test(logSSPFNA ~ MCQ160C, data = PFAsCHDTot2013)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsCHDTot2013, aes(x = logSSPFNA, fill = MCQ160C)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## BFOA
CHDFits2013BFOA <- aov(logSSBFOA ~ MCQ160C, data = PFAsCHDTot2013)
summary(CHDFits2013BFOA)

diff13_bfoa <- diff(tapply(PFAsCHDTot2013$logSSBFOA,
                           PFAsCHDTot2013$MCQ160C, mean))
exp(diff13_bfoa)

t.test(logSSBFOA ~ MCQ160C, data = PFAsCHDTot2013)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsCHDTot2013, aes(x = logSSBFOA, fill = MCQ160C)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## MFOS
CHDFits2013MFOS <- aov(logSSMFOS ~ MCQ160C, data = PFAsCHDTot2013)
summary(CHDFits2013MFOS)

diff13_mfos <- diff(tapply(PFAsCHDTot2013$logSSMFOS,
                           PFAsCHDTot2013$MCQ160C, mean))
exp(diff13_mfos)

#t.test(logSSMFOS ~ MCQ160C, data = PFAsCHDTot2013)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsCHDTot2013, aes(x = logSSMFOS, fill = MCQ160C)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## NFOS
CHDFits2013NFOS <- aov(logSSNFOS ~ MCQ160C, data = PFAsCHDTot2013)
summary(CHDFits2013NFOS)

diff13_nfos <- diff(tapply(PFAsCHDTot2013$logSSNFOS,
                           PFAsCHDTot2013$MCQ160C, mean))
exp(diff13_nfos)

#t.test(logSSNFOS ~ MCQ160C, data = PFAsCHDTot2013)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsCHDTot2013, aes(x = logSSNFOS, fill = MCQ160C)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

##2015
PFAsCHDTot2015 <- PFAsTotal2015 |>
  filter(MCQ160C %in% c(1,2)) |>
  mutate(MCQ160C = factor(MCQ160C,
                          levels = c(1,2),
                          labels = c("Yes","No")))

summary(PFAsCHDTot2015)

## PFHS
CHDFits2015PFHS <- aov(logLBXPFHS ~ MCQ160C, data = PFAsCHDTot2015)
summary(CHDFits2015PFHS)

diff15_pfhs <- diff(tapply(PFAsCHDTot2015$logLBXPFHS,
                           PFAsCHDTot2015$MCQ160C, mean))
exp(diff15_pfhs)

t.test(logLBXPFHS ~ MCQ160C, data = PFAsCHDTot2015)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsCHDTot2015, aes(x = logLBXPFHS, fill = MCQ160C)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## PFNA
CHDFits2015PFNA <- aov(logLBXPFNA ~ MCQ160C, data = PFAsCHDTot2015)
summary(CHDFits2015PFNA)

diff15_pfna <- diff(tapply(PFAsCHDTot2015$logLBXPFNA,
                           PFAsCHDTot2015$MCQ160C, mean))
exp(diff15_pfna)

t.test(logLBXPFNA ~ MCQ160C, data = PFAsCHDTot2015)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsCHDTot2015, aes(x = logLBXPFNA, fill = MCQ160C)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## BFOA
CHDFits2015BFOA <- aov(logLBXBFOA ~ MCQ160C, data = PFAsCHDTot2015)
summary(CHDFits2015BFOA)

diff15_bfoa <- diff(tapply(PFAsCHDTot2015$logLBXBFOA,
                           PFAsCHDTot2015$MCQ160C, mean))
exp(diff15_bfoa)

t.test(logLBXBFOA ~ MCQ160C, data = PFAsCHDTot2015)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsCHDTot2015, aes(x = logLBXBFOA, fill = MCQ160C)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## MFOS
CHDFits2015MFOS <- aov(logLBXMFOS ~ MCQ160C, data = PFAsCHDTot2015)
summary(CHDFits2015MFOS)

diff15_mfos <- diff(tapply(PFAsCHDTot2015$logLBXMFOS,
                           PFAsCHDTot2015$MCQ160C, mean))
exp(diff15_mfos)

t.test(logLBXMFOS ~ MCQ160C, data = PFAsCHDTot2015)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsCHDTot2015, aes(x = logLBXMFOS, fill = MCQ160C)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## NFOA
CHDFits2015NFOA <- aov(logLBXNFOA ~ MCQ160C, data = PFAsCHDTot2015)
summary(CHDFits2015NFOA)

diff15_nfoa <- diff(tapply(PFAsCHDTot2015$logLBXNFOA,
                           PFAsCHDTot2015$MCQ160C, mean))
exp(diff15_nfoa)

t.test(logLBXNFOA ~ MCQ160C, data = PFAsCHDTot2015)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsCHDTot2015, aes(x = logLBXNFOA, fill = MCQ160C)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)
```

## Angina / Angina Pectoris Differences

```{r}
# Angina / Angina Pectoris Differences

### 2011
PFAsAAPTot2011 <- PFAsTotal2011 |>
  filter(MCQ160D %in% c(1,2)) |>
  mutate(MCQ160D = factor(MCQ160D,
                          levels = c(1,2),
                          labels = c("Yes","No")))

summary(PFAsAAPTot2011)

## PFHS
AAPFits2011PFHS <- aov(logLBXPFHS ~ MCQ160D, data = PFAsAAPTot2011)
summary(AAPFits2011PFHS)

diff11_pfhs <- diff(tapply(PFAsAAPTot2011$logLBXPFHS,
                           PFAsAAPTot2011$MCQ160D, mean))
exp(diff11_pfhs)

t.test(logLBXPFHS ~ MCQ160D, data = PFAsAAPTot2011)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsAAPTot2011, aes(x = logLBXPFHS, fill = MCQ160D)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## PFNA
AAPFits2011PFNA <- aov(logLBXPFNA ~ MCQ160D, data = PFAsAAPTot2011)
summary(AAPFits2011PFNA)

diff11_pfna <- diff(tapply(PFAsAAPTot2011$logLBXPFNA,
                           PFAsAAPTot2011$MCQ160D, mean))
exp(diff11_pfna)

t.test(logLBXPFNA ~ MCQ160D, data = PFAsAAPTot2011)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsAAPTot2011, aes(x = logLBXPFNA, fill = MCQ160D)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## PFOA
AAPFits2011PFOA <- aov(logLBXPFOA ~ MCQ160D, data = PFAsAAPTot2011)
summary(AAPFits2011PFOA)

diff11_pfoa <- diff(tapply(PFAsAAPTot2011$logLBXPFOA,
                           PFAsAAPTot2011$MCQ160D, mean))
exp(diff11_pfoa)

t.test(logLBXPFOA ~ MCQ160D, data = PFAsAAPTot2011)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsAAPTot2011, aes(x = logLBXPFOA, fill = MCQ160D)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## PFOS
AAPFits2011PFOS <- aov(logLBXPFOS ~ MCQ160D, data = PFAsAAPTot2011)
summary(AAPFits2011PFOS)

diff11_pfos <- diff(tapply(PFAsAAPTot2011$logLBXPFOS,
                           PFAsAAPTot2011$MCQ160D, mean))
exp(diff11_pfos)

t.test(logLBXPFOS ~ MCQ160D, data = PFAsAAPTot2011)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsAAPTot2011, aes(x = logLBXPFOS, fill = MCQ160D)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

### 2013

PFAsAAPTot2013 <- PFAsTotal2013 |>
  filter(MCQ160D %in% c(1,2)) |>
  mutate(MCQ160D = factor(MCQ160D,
                          levels = c(1,2),
                          labels = c("Yes","No")))

summary(PFAsAAPTot2013)

## PFHS
AAPFits2013PFHS <- aov(logSSPFHS ~ MCQ160D, data = PFAsAAPTot2013)
summary(AAPFits2013PFHS)

diff13_pfhs <- diff(tapply(PFAsAAPTot2013$logSSPFHS,
                           PFAsAAPTot2013$MCQ160D, mean))
exp(diff13_pfhs)

t.test(logSSPFHS ~ MCQ160D, data = PFAsAAPTot2013)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsAAPTot2013, aes(x = logSSPFHS, fill = MCQ160D)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## PFNA
AAPFits2013PFNA <- aov(logSSPFNA ~ MCQ160D, data = PFAsAAPTot2013)
summary(AAPFits2013PFNA)

diff13_pfna <- diff(tapply(PFAsAAPTot2013$logSSPFNA,
                           PFAsAAPTot2013$MCQ160D, mean))
exp(diff13_pfna)

t.test(logSSPFNA ~ MCQ160D, data = PFAsAAPTot2013)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsAAPTot2013, aes(x = logSSPFNA, fill = MCQ160D)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## BFOA
AAPFits2013BFOA <- aov(logSSBFOA ~ MCQ160D, data = PFAsAAPTot2013)
summary(AAPFits2013BFOA)

diff13_bfoa <- diff(tapply(PFAsAAPTot2013$logSSBFOA,
                           PFAsAAPTot2013$MCQ160D, mean))
exp(diff13_bfoa)

ggplot(PFAsAAPTot2013, aes(x = logSSBFOA, fill = MCQ160D)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## MFOS
AAPFits2013MFOS <- aov(logSSMFOS ~ MCQ160D, data = PFAsAAPTot2013)
summary(AAPFits2013MFOS)

diff13_mfos <- diff(tapply(PFAsAAPTot2013$logSSMFOS,
                           PFAsAAPTot2013$MCQ160D, mean))
exp(diff13_mfos)

ggplot(PFAsAAPTot2013, aes(x = logSSMFOS, fill = MCQ160D)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## NFOS
AAPFits2013NFOS <- aov(logSSNFOS ~ MCQ160D, data = PFAsAAPTot2013)
summary(AAPFits2013NFOS)

diff13_nfos <- diff(tapply(PFAsAAPTot2013$logSSNFOS,
                           PFAsAAPTot2013$MCQ160D, mean))
exp(diff13_nfos)

ggplot(PFAsAAPTot2013, aes(x = logSSNFOS, fill = MCQ160D)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

### 2015

PFAsAAPTot2015 <- PFAsTotal2015 |>
  filter(MCQ160D %in% c(1,2)) |>
  mutate(MCQ160D = factor(MCQ160D,
                          levels = c(1,2),
                          labels = c("Yes","No")))

summary(PFAsAAPTot2015)

## PFHS
AAPFits2015PFHS <- aov(logLBXPFHS ~ MCQ160D, data = PFAsAAPTot2015)
summary(AAPFits2015PFHS)

diff15_pfhs <- diff(tapply(PFAsAAPTot2015$logLBXPFHS,
                           PFAsAAPTot2015$MCQ160D, mean))
exp(diff15_pfhs)

t.test(logLBXPFHS ~ MCQ160D, data = PFAsAAPTot2015)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsAAPTot2015, aes(x = logLBXPFHS, fill = MCQ160D)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## PFNA
AAPFits2015PFNA <- aov(logLBXPFNA ~ MCQ160D, data = PFAsAAPTot2015)
summary(AAPFits2015PFNA)

diff15_pfna <- diff(tapply(PFAsAAPTot2015$logLBXPFNA,
                           PFAsAAPTot2015$MCQ160D, mean))
exp(diff15_pfna)

t.test(logLBXPFNA ~ MCQ160D, data = PFAsAAPTot2015)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsAAPTot2015, aes(x = logLBXPFNA, fill = MCQ160D)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## BFOA
AAPFits2015BFOA <- aov(logLBXBFOA ~ MCQ160D, data = PFAsAAPTot2015)
summary(AAPFits2015BFOA)

diff15_bfoa <- diff(tapply(PFAsAAPTot2015$logLBXBFOA,
                           PFAsAAPTot2015$MCQ160D, mean))
exp(diff15_bfoa)

t.test(logLBXBFOA ~ MCQ160D, data = PFAsAAPTot2015)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsAAPTot2015, aes(x = logLBXBFOA, fill = MCQ160D)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## MFOS
AAPFits2015MFOS <- aov(logLBXMFOS ~ MCQ160D, data = PFAsAAPTot2015)
summary(AAPFits2015MFOS)

diff15_mfos <- diff(tapply(PFAsAAPTot2015$logLBXMFOS,
                           PFAsAAPTot2015$MCQ160D, mean))
exp(diff15_mfos)

t.test(logLBXMFOS ~ MCQ160D, data = PFAsAAPTot2015)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsAAPTot2015, aes(x = logLBXMFOS, fill = MCQ160D)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## NFOA
AAPFits2015NFOA <- aov(logLBXNFOA ~ MCQ160D, data = PFAsAAPTot2015)
summary(AAPFits2015NFOA)

diff15_nfoa <- diff(tapply(PFAsAAPTot2015$logLBXNFOA,
                           PFAsAAPTot2015$MCQ160D, mean))
exp(diff15_nfoa)

t.test(logLBXNFOA ~ MCQ160D, data = PFAsAAPTot2015)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsAAPTot2015, aes(x = logLBXNFOA, fill = MCQ160D)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)
```

## Heart Attack

```{r}
# Heart Attack Differences

### 2011
PFAsHATot2011 <- PFAsTotal2011 |>
  filter(MCQ160E %in% c(1,2)) |>
  mutate(MCQ160E = factor(MCQ160E,
                          levels = c(1,2),
                          labels = c("Yes","No")))

summary(PFAsHATot2011)

## PFHS
diff11_pfhs <- diff(tapply(PFAsHATot2011$logLBXPFHS,
                          PFAsHATot2011$MCQ160E, mean))
exp(diff11_pfhs)

t.test(logLBXPFHS ~ MCQ160E, data = PFAsHATot2011)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsHATot2011, aes(x = logLBXPFHS, fill = MCQ160E)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## PFNA
diff11_pfna <- diff(tapply(PFAsHATot2011$logLBXPFNA,
                          PFAsHATot2011$MCQ160E, mean))
exp(diff11_pfna)

t.test(logLBXPFNA ~ MCQ160E, data = PFAsHATot2011)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsHATot2011, aes(x = logLBXPFNA, fill = MCQ160E)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## PFOA
diff11_pfoa <- diff(tapply(PFAsHATot2011$logLBXPFOA,
                          PFAsHATot2011$MCQ160E, mean))
exp(diff11_pfoa)

t.test(logLBXPFOA ~ MCQ160E, data = PFAsHATot2011)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsHATot2011, aes(x = logLBXPFOA, fill = MCQ160E)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## PFOS
diff11_pfos <- diff(tapply(PFAsHATot2011$logLBXPFOS,
                          PFAsHATot2011$MCQ160E, mean))
exp(diff11_pfos)

t.test(logLBXPFOS ~ MCQ160E, data = PFAsHATot2011)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsHATot2011, aes(x = logLBXPFOS, fill = MCQ160E)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

### 2013

PFAsHATot2013 <- PFAsTotal2013 |>
  filter(MCQ160E %in% c(1,2)) |>
  mutate(MCQ160E = factor(MCQ160E,
                          levels = c(1,2),
                          labels = c("Yes","No")))

summary(PFAsHATot2013)

## PFHS
diff13_pfhs <- diff(tapply(PFAsHATot2013$logSSPFHS,
                          PFAsHATot2013$MCQ160E, mean))
exp(diff13_pfhs)

t.test(logSSPFHS ~ MCQ160E, data = PFAsHATot2013)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsHATot2013, aes(x = logSSPFHS, fill = MCQ160E)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## PFNA
diff13_pfna <- diff(tapply(PFAsHATot2013$logSSPFNA,
                          PFAsHATot2013$MCQ160E, mean))
exp(diff13_pfna)

t.test(logSSPFNA ~ MCQ160E, data = PFAsHATot2013)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsHATot2013, aes(x = logSSPFNA, fill = MCQ160E)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## BFOA
diff13_bfoa <- diff(tapply(PFAsHATot2013$logSSBFOA,
                          PFAsHATot2013$MCQ160E, mean))
exp(diff13_bfoa)

ggplot(PFAsHATot2013, aes(x = logSSBFOA, fill = MCQ160E)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## MFOS
diff13_mfos <- diff(tapply(PFAsHATot2013$logSSMFOS,
                          PFAsHATot2013$MCQ160E, mean))
exp(diff13_mfos)

ggplot(PFAsHATot2013, aes(x = logSSMFOS, fill = MCQ160E)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## NFOS
diff13_nfos <- diff(tapply(PFAsHATot2013$logSSNFOS,
                          PFAsHATot2013$MCQ160E, mean))
exp(diff13_nfos)

ggplot(PFAsHATot2013, aes(x = logSSNFOS, fill = MCQ160E)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

### 2015
PFAsHATot2015 <- PFAsTotal2015 |>
  filter(MCQ160E %in% c(1,2)) |>
  mutate(MCQ160E = factor(MCQ160E,
                          levels = c(1,2),
                          labels = c("Yes","No")))

summary(PFAsHATot2015)

## PFHS
diff15_pfhs <- diff(tapply(PFAsHATot2015$logLBXPFHS,
                          PFAsHATot2015$MCQ160E, mean))
exp(diff15_pfhs)

t.test(logLBXPFHS ~ MCQ160E, data = PFAsHATot2015)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsHATot2015, aes(x = logLBXPFHS, fill = MCQ160E)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## PFNA
diff15_pfna <- diff(tapply(PFAsHATot2015$logLBXPFNA,
                          PFAsHATot2015$MCQ160E, mean))
exp(diff15_pfna)

t.test(logLBXPFNA ~ MCQ160E, data = PFAsHATot2015)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsHATot2015, aes(x = logLBXPFNA, fill = MCQ160E)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## BFOA
diff15_bfoa <- diff(tapply(PFAsHATot2015$logLBXBFOA,
                          PFAsHATot2015$MCQ160E, mean))
exp(diff15_bfoa)

t.test(logLBXBFOA ~ MCQ160E, data = PFAsHATot2015)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsHATot2015, aes(x = logLBXBFOA, fill = MCQ160E)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## MFOS
diff15_mfos <- diff(tapply(PFAsHATot2015$logLBXMFOS,
                          PFAsHATot2015$MCQ160E, mean))
exp(diff15_mfos)

t.test(logLBXMFOS ~ MCQ160E, data = PFAsHATot2015)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsHATot2015, aes(x = logLBXMFOS, fill = MCQ160E)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## NFOA
diff15_nfoa <- diff(tapply(PFAsHATot2015$logLBXNFOA,
                          PFAsHATot2015$MCQ160E, mean))
exp(diff15_nfoa)

t.test(logLBXNFOA ~ MCQ160E, data = PFAsHATot2015)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsHATot2015, aes(x = logLBXNFOA, fill = MCQ160E)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

```

## Stroke

```{r}
# Stroke Differences

### 2011

PFAsSTTot2011 <- PFAsTotal2011 |>
  filter(MCQ160F %in% c(1,2)) |>
  mutate(MCQ160F = factor(MCQ160F,
                          levels = c(1,2),
                          labels = c("Yes","No")))

summary(PFAsSTTot2011)

## PFHS
diff11_pfhs <- diff(tapply(PFAsSTTot2011$logLBXPFHS,
                          PFAsSTTot2011$MCQ160F, mean))
exp(diff11_pfhs)

t.test(logLBXPFHS ~ MCQ160F, data = PFAsSTTot2011)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsSTTot2011, aes(x = logLBXPFHS, fill = MCQ160F)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## PFNA
diff11_pfna <- diff(tapply(PFAsSTTot2011$logLBXPFNA,
                          PFAsSTTot2011$MCQ160F, mean))
exp(diff11_pfna)

t.test(logLBXPFNA ~ MCQ160F, data = PFAsSTTot2011)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsSTTot2011, aes(x = logLBXPFNA, fill = MCQ160F)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## PFOA
diff11_pfoa <- diff(tapply(PFAsSTTot2011$logLBXPFOA,
                          PFAsSTTot2011$MCQ160F, mean))
exp(diff11_pfoa)

t.test(logLBXPFOA ~ MCQ160F, data = PFAsSTTot2011)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsSTTot2011, aes(x = logLBXPFOA, fill = MCQ160F)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## PFOS
diff11_pfos <- diff(tapply(PFAsSTTot2011$logLBXPFOS,
                          PFAsSTTot2011$MCQ160F, mean))
exp(diff11_pfos)

t.test(logLBXPFOS ~ MCQ160F, data = PFAsSTTot2011)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsSTTot2011, aes(x = logLBXPFOS, fill = MCQ160F)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

### 2013

PFAsSTTot2013 <- PFAsTotal2013 |>
  filter(MCQ160F %in% c(1,2)) |>
  mutate(MCQ160F = factor(MCQ160F,
                          levels = c(1,2),
                          labels = c("Yes","No")))

summary(PFAsSTTot2013)

## PFHS
diff13_pfhs <- diff(tapply(PFAsSTTot2013$logSSPFHS,
                          PFAsSTTot2013$MCQ160F, mean))
exp(diff13_pfhs)

t.test(logSSPFHS ~ MCQ160F, data = PFAsSTTot2013)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsSTTot2013, aes(x = logSSPFHS, fill = MCQ160F)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## PFNA
diff13_pfna <- diff(tapply(PFAsSTTot2013$logSSPFNA,
                          PFAsSTTot2013$MCQ160F, mean))
exp(diff13_pfna)

t.test(logSSPFNA ~ MCQ160F, data = PFAsSTTot2013)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsSTTot2013, aes(x = logSSPFNA, fill = MCQ160F)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## BFOA
diff13_bfoa <- diff(tapply(PFAsSTTot2013$logSSBFOA,
                          PFAsSTTot2013$MCQ160F, mean))
exp(diff13_bfoa)

t.test(logSSBFOA ~ MCQ160F, data = PFAsSTTot2013)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsSTTot2013, aes(x = logSSBFOA, fill = MCQ160F)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## MFOS
diff13_mfos <- diff(tapply(PFAsSTTot2013$logSSMFOS,
                          PFAsSTTot2013$MCQ160F, mean))
exp(diff13_mfos)

#t.test(logSSMFOS ~ MCQ160F, data = PFAsSTTot2013)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsSTTot2013, aes(x = logSSMFOS, fill = MCQ160F)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## NFOS
diff13_nfos <- diff(tapply(PFAsSTTot2013$logSSNFOS,
                          PFAsSTTot2013$MCQ160F, mean))
exp(diff13_nfos)

#t.test(logSSNFOS ~ MCQ160F, data = PFAsSTTot2013)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsSTTot2013, aes(x = logSSNFOS, fill = MCQ160F)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

### 2015

PFAsSTTot2015 <- PFAsTotal2015 |>
  filter(MCQ160F %in% c(1,2)) |>
  mutate(MCQ160F = factor(MCQ160F,
                          levels = c(1,2),
                          labels = c("Yes","No")))

summary(PFAsSTTot2015)

## PFHS
diff15_pfhs <- diff(tapply(PFAsSTTot2015$logLBXPFHS,
                          PFAsSTTot2015$MCQ160F, mean))
exp(diff15_pfhs)

t.test(logLBXPFHS ~ MCQ160F, data = PFAsSTTot2015)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsSTTot2015, aes(x = logLBXPFHS, fill = MCQ160F)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## PFNA
diff15_pfna <- diff(tapply(PFAsSTTot2015$logLBXPFNA,
                          PFAsSTTot2015$MCQ160F, mean))
exp(diff15_pfna)

t.test(logLBXPFNA ~ MCQ160F, data = PFAsSTTot2015)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsSTTot2015, aes(x = logLBXPFNA, fill = MCQ160F)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## BFOA
diff15_bfoa <- diff(tapply(PFAsSTTot2015$logLBXBFOA,
                          PFAsSTTot2015$MCQ160F, mean))
exp(diff15_bfoa)

t.test(logLBXBFOA ~ MCQ160F, data = PFAsSTTot2015)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsSTTot2015, aes(x = logLBXBFOA, fill = MCQ160F)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## MFOS
diff15_mfos <- diff(tapply(PFAsSTTot2015$logLBXMFOS,
                          PFAsSTTot2015$MCQ160F, mean))
exp(diff15_mfos)

t.test(logLBXMFOS ~ MCQ160F, data = PFAsSTTot2015)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsSTTot2015, aes(x = logLBXMFOS, fill = MCQ160F)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)

## NFOA
diff15_nfoa <- diff(tapply(PFAsSTTot2015$logLBXNFOA,
                          PFAsSTTot2015$MCQ160F, mean))
exp(diff15_nfoa)

t.test(logLBXNFOA ~ MCQ160F, data = PFAsSTTot2015)$conf.int

ggplot(PFAsSTTot2015, aes(x = logLBXNFOA, fill = MCQ160F)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4)
```
